reviews.text: Was told by the front desk person that they do not cover personal injury by police misconduct and only handle wrongful death and big cases. They should change their page to correctly represent this.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello, Thank you for sharing your thoughts and we are reviewing our website to make sure it accurately reflects our practice area, as it has changed over the years.  We are a very small firm, and find we can have the largest impact for our clients by maintaining a small caseload of cases involving wrongful death or serious physical injuries.  There are other lawyers who handle personal injury claims involving police, but very few who can competently handle serious injury and wrongful death jail and police misconduct cases.  I am sorry we cannot assist you, and wish you the very best in finding an attorney that is a good fit for you, Julia Sherwin, Haddad & Sherwin LLP

reviews.text: I can’t recommend Michael Haddad and Julia Sherwin enough.  They were extremely professional, a pleasure to work with, and the outcome was exceptional.  Their preparation was meticulous and their execution of that during my trial was brilliant.  In fact, they were glaringly superior to the opposing attorney and his case.  I rate them as excellent.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Gary.  The order we obtained after trial has been used by us and other lawyers in many cases around the country, and we thank you for allowing us the honor of representing you.

reviews.text: We can’t say enough good things about Haddad & Sherwin. They are sincere, compassionate, caring and professional, as is their whole staff. We don’t know how we would have made it through this awful time in our lives. They went up and beyond. They are extremely knowledgeable and kept us informed every step of the way. They treated us with respect and dignity. They were able to change reforms in policy and training for first responders for the City of Napa so what happened to our grand-daughter will not happen to another child. They continue to honor our grand-daughter which is much appreciated. I highly recommend them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Robin.  We are so grateful to have represented you, your granddaughter, son and husband, and that we were able to achieve strong reforms to prevent what happened to your family from happening again.  Julia

reviews.text:
When our son was shot to death by a police officer in Santa Cruz, California, we contacted Haddad & Sherwin. Michael Haddad immediately made himself available by phone. His compassion, clarity and straight talk were invaluable to us as we navigated those first traumatic four days following our son’s death.

Upon meeting with the Haddad & Sherwin team we experienced calm, clear and kindly counsel as to what we could expect in the coming weeks and months: the DA would most certainly decide in favor of the police; we would not know whether or not a wrongful death case was wise to pursue until the Haddad & Sherwin team got more information which would take several months; a lawsuit would likely take two years.

The Haddad & Sherwin team was always respectful and supportive of our family. They reached a just and fair settlement that included injunctive relief leading to important changes to policy, training and practices in the Santa Cruz Police Department, including changes to the language in their manual regarding “use of lethal force.”

Throughout the trauma and tribulations during the two years until the final settlement of our case, the professionalism, integrity and humanity of everyone in Haddad & Sherwin office helped us to walk a path we could never have imagined we would to be on. Their straightforwardness, perseverance and patience with the challenges of this case helped stabilize us during our grieving process and with each phase of the lawsuit.

Our family experienced the nightmare of our son being murdered by a Vacaville PD police seargent.
My son had a 5 1/2 yr old son that was left without a father and Michael Haddad and his team made sure that my grandson would be taken care of in the absence of his father, although you cannot place a monetary value on the love, care and loss of relationship of his father.  The entire office of Haddad and Sherwin were very compassionate towards our family during a very sensitive time with the loss of our son.  Everyone in the office were very responsive to every phone call and email.  They kept us informed during every step of the lawsuit proceedings and made our life easier during a very difficult time.  We are very grateful to Haddad and Sherwin!  They not only represented our family’s best interest,  their caring professionalism helped us through the grief and loss of our son.   Haddad and Sherwin made sure my grandsons’s future is secure.
Thank you!  Leslie Molera (mother of Kendall Walker)

This firm is professional and knowledgeable. They are capable of taking on the largest of opponents, ie the government. Haddad and Sherwin are willing and able to take each case to court, not merely settling for an inadequate settlement. Thanks again

April 12,2016 was the worst day of my life.I was assaulted By the santa clara police which resulted in a dislocation and 4 breaks to my left ankle. I had refused to let police into my home without a warrant. Not knowing who to ask for help i found michael and julia, after taking my case(and NOT knowing at that point there was a video) they worked tirelessly to get me and my family justice. I count my lucky stars that i found these two wonderful compassionate people. They are not afraid to fight for what’s right in a world where people with authority seem to get away with so much. They are honest and upfront. They will tell you straight out if they think it’s a case that has a chance and what those chances of winning are.
My family and I were very fortunate to have such incredible lawyers. They went above and beyond on my father's wrongful death case!

I can only speak to my experience with Haddad & Sherwin.  While I wish it weren't so, whoever is reading this may find themselves Googling for civil rights attorneys who specialize in police shooting and/or misconduct--or are doing so now.  From somebody who has been there, dial the number.

My brother, a husband and a father of four,  ran a small salvage logging business with our father and uncle.  He and my sister-in-law had just purchased a small farm, for which they had planned and saved many years, even living without electricity and plumbing in a travel trailer between obsidian, junipers, and lava flows to save the last of the down payment.  Just months into their fulfilled dream, on a cooling evening on a country road far from windows and passerby and lights, he was shot dead by deputies during a medical and mental-health episode--a death that could have, should have, been avoided by employing basic Crisis Intervention Techniques.

Words cannot describe the questions, the rage, the sighs, the "what ifs?"-- the devastating disappointment of my government erecting a wall as silent and cold and formidable and impenetrable as that of Westeros between our family and the whole, factual truth.

Where to go, who to call, what to do?  Googled Civil Rights Attorneys who specialize in police shootings, opened Haddad & Sherwin, looked up a couple of the published cases won by Michael, called, and left a most-likely distraught message (I don't remember what I said) after 5:00pm.  Fifteen minutes later a return call from Michael.  Soon after a personal meeting with Michael.  He met us half-way between our mountain town and Oakland.  He put us at ease, dressed casual, and didn't speak in legalese.  Explained the law, gave us hope, but didn't pull back from real and hard truths.  Nothing overpromised, realistic and clear expectations, no "sales" pitch.

Every time I or other family members called the office, someone would call us back or send us an email, either to speak at length or to let us know when they would be able to.  After a long, hard fight, Haddad & Sherwin GOT THE FACTS AND EVIDENCE!  After that, there were less questions.  God and time have helped with the rage, the sighs, and the "what ifs?"
I don’t know where the negative reviews came from, these employees worked so hard and do a great job. Thankful for this firm
If your case is not caught on camera or follow by the media they wont take it
The website posts are impressive  and you may feel like they really care. Don't expect what you read  as reality.

AMERICA!! I called these attorneys because for the past fifteen years and counting, I have been repeatedly harassed by the San Joaquin Sheriffs Department.  I get this call from a person by the name Three from the Haddad and Sherwin law firm, and she tells me that there is nothing they can do for me because the police have not physically hurt me. Duhh!!! That's why I'm looking for counsel before the police kill me.
She further went on to say that misconduct by the police is not her practice of law.  I told her that that not what your web site says.
She was rude and had no legal advice for me, even though she is a member of the state bar, and as a member of the state bar, attorneys are officers of the court, and she had no advice for me.  what a lair!!
This law firm, in my opinion doesn't care about civil rights only the money that they collect when someone get hurt.  America, stay away from blood sucks like these guys...
Rude and disrespectful
They will help you with your legal issues

I would recommend Bob Salinas to anyone facing bad behavior from a landlord. We went to him when our landlord tried to illegally evict every person in our complex, and he guided us through the process of collecting evidence and responding to the eviction threats, and then helped us through mediation and to a settlement that kept us all in our homes.

The thing I really want to stress, though, is how kind and patient he is with his clients. Needless to say we were beyond anxious and stressed out over the landlord's threats, but he was always there for us, giving us so much more of his time than he had to -- even though our case was much smaller than many of the other cases his firm handles.

Going with the Salinas Law Group is one of the best decisions we've ever made.

I can say nothing but good things about this Law Firm my family and I are truly grateful and pleased with the outcome of our case we were going to be part of the statistics that is here in Oakland about the wrongful evictions that is going on part of landlords that do unlawful things to evict people and thanks to Robert Salinas and Rocio Toriz and all the wonderful people that work in the law firm with us during the case my family and I thank you and will highly recommend this Law Firm if I can give more than 5 stars I will give them a 100 Stars

Bob helped my partner and I defend against an illegal eviction, keeping us and our neighbors in our home for good. When our landlord kept harassing us, he helped us sue him and win a settlement through mediation. Throughout one of the most challenging periods of my life, Bob has been a trusted partner and even friend. He looked out for us, sometimes over his own interest, many times and I would trust him with anything. Choosing to work with Bob is not only a good move for your own legal interest, but supporting his firm also helps them have resources to help marginalized people fight crooked landlords during this devastating housing crisis.

My husband and I ended up in a situation that I would have never expected we would have been in. Being situationally homeless was traumatizing and left us feeling hopeless. Bob Salinas really helped us see a light at the end of the tunnel; he is patient, he is kind, and he is honest. It always felt like he had our best interests at heart. Most importantly, he knows the laws and will protect you.
I am so happy to have worked with him and his staff. Our life has turned around since he assisted with our case. He's taught us so much about the legal system and tenant rights. If you are considering retaining a lawyer to help with your tenant rights I highly recommend Bob Salinas. You will not regret it! He will fight for you!! Thank you soooo much Bob!!

My wife and I were put into a situation that I wouldn't wish upon my worst enemy. This period in my life was dark and I felt like I was running out of all options. Bob Salinas really turned this around for us; he is kind, patient, honest and always felt like he had our backs. Most importantly, he knows the laws and will protect you.

I can't thank Bob enough;  so happy to have worked with him and his staff. My life has turned around since he assisted with our case. He's taught me so much about the legal system and tenant rights. If you're on the fence and considering working with them... do it. You will not regret it! He will fight for you!! Thank you soooo much Bob!!

I was forced into a horrible situation with what I thought was little to no recourse. Mr Salinas took my case and was truly a force. His patience, intelligence, transparency, and ethics shined thru with every interaction.

I can’t recommend Mr Salinas enough. If you’re looking for representation who truly cares about you receiving the justice you deserve hire him. Thank you so much for your hard work and you’re honestly a blessing

Robert Salinas and Rocio Toriz are extremely dedicated, professional, and principled attorneys.

They know Oakland laws, and fought hard for a group of low-income tenants being harassed, bullied, and constructively evicted by a well-funded predatory developer, winning us a fair settlement after a long fight.

I recommend them highly and without hesitation.

If you have been wronged and need someone fight for you, there's no better person or law firm to help you than Bob Salinas and the Salinas Law Group.

Litigation isn't something you get excited for or want to be a part of. But if you find yourself in such a situation, you'll want a team helping you that is ethical, vigilant, and honorable. The Salinas Law Group is such a team.

Mr. Salinas and his group are true professionals in every sense of the word. They truly care about you, the unjust practices that harm the community, and the truth. Be prepared to be as honest with them as humanly possible, even if it's a little uncomfortable. They are extremely honest, and will extract the truth from any situation with their legal wizardry and use it like the hammer of Odin to help you achieve justice.

Thank you, Mr. Salinas, for fighting for me and my family. We will always remember you!
Best legal team
Robert Salinas is an excellent attorney,  he fought hard for us, and negotiated an acceptable settlement.

I can absolutely recommend Phil his partner Chris Banks. Not only is Phil a luminary in employment law, but you would be hard pressed to find a team with their tenacity, attention to detail and legal prowess. This team has high standards, integrity and honesty, and that works.

I had spent the morning calling around to different lawyer offices and getting the same type of service - getting transferred to intake, giving up loads of personal information only to be told that someone will call me back within a week maybe possibly sooner, and I couldn’t even get basic questions answered.

I am going to do the things he suggested and if down the road I turns out that I do need a lawyer for this matter, Devin Coyle Law will be the first place I call.

In 2019, I experienced a slip and fall incident that significantly impacted my life. Initially, I faced immense challenges as no attorney was willing to take my case, and the insurance company's meager offer of $10,000 barely covered my medical expenses. However, my fortunes changed when I met Pete, a personal injury attorney whose dedication and commitment to justice stood out from the rest.
Pete was the only attorney courageous enough to take on my challenging case. From the outset, he and his assistant, Debby, provided unparalleled support and guidance. They were not just legal representatives; they were compassionate allies who genuinely cared about my well-being and fought tirelessly for my rights.
Thanks to Pete's expertise and relentless perseverance, we achieved a monumental victory—a $260,000 settlement that far exceeded my expectations. This settlement has not only helped cover my medical costs but also provided me with the financial security to move forward in life.
Pete's approach to my case was nothing short of extraordinary. He went above and beyond what I believed was possible for an attorney. His strategic thinking, empathy, and unwavering support throughout the legal process were instrumental in securing a favorable outcome.
I am immensely grateful to Pete and Debby for their exceptional service and support. Debby, in particular, deserves a special mention for her diligent work, which undoubtedly contributed to the positive resolution of my case. It's clear that their combined efforts stem from a genuine desire to help those in need.
To anyone facing personal injury challenges, I wholeheartedly recommend Pete and his team. They are not just attorneys; they are life-changers who will stand by you every step of the way. Thank you, Pete and Debby, for everything you have done. Your hard work and dedication have truly made a difference in my life.

Pete and his team were really great. I took a year to decide to sue. One year remained on the clock to file a suit for my motorcycle - car accident. The police report was non-committal on fault despite three witnesses whose statements matched mine. I used my legal benefits program at work. Read some reviews and testimonials on Pete's site and decided to give him a try. I sent an email through their online form at 4:11pm on a Monday. (I'm looking at the email as I write this.) Pete responded at 4:17! Obviously he wasn't with a client at the time. By 4:30 I had left a message with the office to schedule an appointment per his instructions

The next morning, at 9:07, Vanessa asked the office and me via email, if anyone had responded to me. They are really responsive and on top of things. She then saw my voice message. Pete and I talked briefly on the phone and I scheduled a face-to-face, as he prefers that. We met in two days.

Pete was friendly, helpful, clear. He struck me as honest and competent. He laid out the possibilities. He did not over-promise.

We were in contact on months 1, 4, 5 ,6, 10, and 12. Pete advised patience and I did my best to just let him and his office do the case in their time and style. I was a bit anxious nothing would come of it as the clock ticked down. We had a pathetic offer in month 6. But they were still fighting for me. We ended up with a surprisingly good settlement. Pete, Kevin, and Vanessa were great to work with. I've referred others to him. On this Thanksgiving Day, I say, thank you, Pete et al.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow! Thanks, Mark! Happy Thanksgiving to you as well. Thank you for the kind words and for having the patience it sometimes takes to get favorable results. We look forward to more pictures from the road!

I was recommended to talk with Pete Clancy by a close coworker.  That recommendation set me at ease because I knew she wouldn’t steer me wrong. And since I was having to deal with all sorts of matters pertaining to my accident, that helped me square away a huge chunk of relief. Relief that someone very responsible and knowledgeable would be on my side. You see,  I was the pedestrian that was hit by a car while walking in the crosswalk.

Even though Clancy & Diaz is located in Walnut Creek, Pete kindly agreed to came down to Santa Clara where I live to meet with me since I was incapacitated and was not able to bear any weight on my leg for seven weeks. At the time,  even getting into a car meant taking the wheelchair and putting on my brace to travel any distance. All of that would have been very taxing and wearing on my injured body.

How kind it was of him to come to Santa Clara to meet with me to discuss my case, to give me the consultation in person in my home since I was basically couch bound.

Pete has such a personable manner about him. He actively listens and shows genuine sincerity in his words and in his actions.   My niece, who was in town from Ohio and helping to take care of me thought Pete was engaging,  straightforward and very knowledgeable.

Pete was the liaison, the conduit that helped deal with my medical bills, the car insurance company’s and all the paperwork.  He fought for me even when I was willing to give up.

I was always able to reach him by email, phone  or text message.  He helped me receive the best claims settlement  possible.  I can’t say enough superlatives about the way he handled my case and how he made me feel more than just another client but as an individual that he lavished his time and attention on.

Take it from someone who’s been there...You can’t go wrong with Clancy & Diaz on your side.

reviews.text: Ravi is smart, honest, and a pleasure to work with. His legal counsel has made a lot of tough decisions easier for me to understand, and I always seek him out whenever I need a clear and rational head on how to proceed forward with legal matters. Cannot recommend him enough!

After multiple attorneys could not help me, Ravi filed a Heggstad petition allowing me to avoid the probate process.  He was no nonsense, explained every step and kept his word as to timing and outcome.  Also, his fee was extremely reasonable.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, it was a pleasure to work with you!

reviews.text: Ravi helped me with a Heggstad Petition. My husband and I had three bank accounts that somehow weren't properly connected to our trust by the bank. When my husband died those accounts were immediately locked. In addition to being completely grief stricken, I had this hugely stressful financial problem. I contacted Ravi and he immediately stepped into action, describing to me the possibilities of the Heggstad and the probability of it working for me. Not only was he completely knowledgeable, but he was calm and totally supportive in what for me was a very difficult time. Throughout the process he was in great contact and very pro-active. I ended up regaining possession of all three bank accounts because of Ravi's work. The Heggstad option, Ravi's familiarity with that process, his professionalism, and his care were a godsend to me.

I was closing on a California property with an offer in hand, just to find out I needed to have a Heggstad Petition done before the deal could close. After reaching out to several attorneys, getting steered in the wrong direction many times, I, to my great relief, connected with the Law Office of Ravi Patel.   He was - hands down - the most responsive, professional, knowledgeable, thorough, and helpful attorney I’ve ever worked with. My experience with Attorney Ravi Patel was nothing short of exceptional.

He is amazingly fast at responding to emails, has great attention to detail, operates with a strategic approach and has a compassionate demeanor.  He gave great thought to my case, asked all the right questions, and provided excellent guidance from his vast expertise with Heggstad Petitions in California.  I highly recommend the Law Office of Ravi Patel for your legal needs!

Ravi expertly handled filing a Heggstad Petition on my behalf to the Court for property inadvertently overlooked in my late father's trust. He handled all the details from start to finish, guaranteed the results, and promptly notified me of its progress. I highly recommend him. There are few lawyers with his level of expertise in this area. These petitions can be tricky in less capable hands. Ravi gets the job done!
Ravi was excellent. He is knowledgeable and experienced in Probate and Estate Planning. Everything went smoothly and better than expected. I would highly recommend him to anyone.
Very,  very, intelligent.  Reasonably priced,  honest.   What more could a person ask for!

Taking a Heggstad Petition with a particularly picky Probate Examiner, 34 beneficiaries requiring notice and a 100 page petition Ravi picked up the ball and carried it over the line and he did it with minimal input and reasonable costs. Personable guy. Hats off and highly recommended
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Marc! It was a pleasure to assist with your petition.

The result? Nicole secured an amazing settlement. This life-changing amount ensured my medical care was fully covered, my lost income was restored, and provided true security for my future. It was a resolution I could never have imagined achieving on my own.

I cannot recommend Ayala, Morgan & Buzzard law firm highly enough. They operate with integrity, fight with tenacity, and deliver extraordinary results. reviews.text: A friend applied for social security disability after she became disabled as the result of an illness, and she asked me to write a review for Mr. Kopp.  I have observed that she stresses over things, and stress adds to her disability.  My friend explained that Mr. Kopp’s skills, patience and experience were keys to lowering her stress.  And, her claim was approved!  She would definitely recommend Mr. Kopp.

I am in the process of settling my worker’s comp case due to a back injury several years ago.
I contacted Mr. Kopp, based on all the positive reviews.  Another reviewer mentioned that he answers the phone in his own office and that was absolutely true in my case as well.  I have to say, I probably have never been given such helpful legal advice over the phone in my entire life.  After explaining my case to him, Mr. Kopp patiently and thoroughly explained what my rights were, what could potentially happen if I chose one option over another option, and answered every single one of my questions for almost an hour.  After our conversation, I felt much more confident settling my case and I have Mr. Kopp to thank for that.  I also asked him at the end of our conversation if he thought I needed an attorney.  He said he didn’t feel like I needed one which made me feel that he was looking out for my interests instead of his own.  If you are in search of a kind, thorough and intelligent attorney to handle your legal issues, I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Mr. Kopp.

This meant we had to apply for and make NO MISTAKES on the application, for disability both state and federal. If you make a mistake, it can take up to 18 months to rectify. Not only did he and my husband bond over their passions for baseball and fine woodworking, he walked us through applying online, on his lunch hour, and then refused to charge us. John made it to 18 months and my family--well, we are so very grateful.

reviews.text: The person who helped me was Ehoud Appel and he was very kind, informative, and thorough. I highly recommend this business and the people who work for them. Thanks again  Ehoud!!!

I hired Spencer for a consultation regarding my LLC's potential exposure and risks under AB-5. Spencer asked me ahead of our call to provide, in writing, my specific questions, and one by one, he went through them with me explaining what my risks are and under what circumstances they could be triggered. He used many examples to show how the law might apply in different scenarios and related them specifically to my business methods as well. He even offered some suggestions about how to legally mitigate my exposure. It was an hour and money well spent.

Super responsive and knowledgeable - Spencer not only responded to my inquiry over the weekend but called me immediately on Monday and took time to explain my legal options even though the case wasn't a good fit for his firm.

Great response time!  Very thorough!  Knows his stuff!  My experience was first rate and would recommend Mr. Young because he took the time to address my concerns, provide clear examples, and most importantly, he listened.

Mr Young is a brilliant young man with an astounding ability to sort through the dross of a situation, and get a handle on the true issues. And with all that having been said, he communicates with compassion, making sure you understand your options.  I recommend  him unreservedly.

I hired Spencer to assist with a presentation and an audit. While on the phone with a client the client decided they didn’t want Spencer’s services. I had paid a 50% deposit to ensure Spencer showed and to make sure he felt comfortable that I would pay in full once service was complete. This was after several back and forth exchanges about his rates - conversations of which he would later attempt to bill me for even though these conversations were discussions about what he would be doing if we worked together and what the rates would be. I sent a letter of disengagement that was mutually confirmed. He didn’t do the presentation and didn’t complete the audit. Since I had prepaid for a presentation and audit 50% I asked if he could finish the audit and then we could call it even. He refused. I said if he wasn’t going to complete any service then it would be a total cancelation of service which is fine but my money needed to be returned. He also declined willingness to do this. I’m asking why he was feeling so strongly about this he referenced a conversation that was supposed to take 15 min that took 55 min and that he stepped out from a birthday party to take it. The 15 min call was about his rates and what he would theoretically be doing in working together and was not a consultive service. I was frustrated that he felt he should be paid to negotiate his rate. I was trying to be accommodating and allow him to keep the first payment intended for the presentation if he were willing to complete the first step of our work together and formalize it into a tangible document. Instead Spencer seemed to feel I should pay him almost $500 to negotiate his rates and to do an initial call where he asked questions of a client in anticipation of a diversity audit but not actually complete the diversity audit and still get paid for it. The agreement was not an hourly agreement it was for a service which was not rendered due to cancelation. While I was excited to find a new local partner that quickly became an uncomfortable, unprofessional and unfortunate situation when I had to dispute with my bank due to his business practices. He also sent me a hostile email saying don’t ever contact him again and that he was blocking me when I reached out about him completing half of the service he was contracted to do or to return my money. Had he not mandated me not to contact him and he would have been willing to have a professional conversation if sure we could have come to terms. It’s not the kind of temperament that I’m used to with subcontractors, attorneys who care about diversity as employment lawyers or small business. I was disappointed and bummed about the experience and I hope in the future that this will be a one off situation for him. He otherwise was willing to step in in an emergency last min project of which he was made aware of the circumstances surrounding it and the urgency and needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: This client tried to create and hold me responsible for a NEW contract term weeks AFTER the agreement was inked and the first half of the job was done.  The term “audit”, and the written work it implies, was never in our contract.  I never bill people for talking about my rates.  I could not talk about my rates for 55 minutes even if someone paid me to do so; my rate is my rate and it was stated at the beginning.  Her statement about being charged to discuss it is patently false.  I stand by my decision to follow our written agreement, do the work I promised I would do, then refuse to do, or communicate about doing, additional work outside of the scope of our agreement.  I only block e-mail addresses when necessary to reduce unnecessary distractions and keep my sanity.  Given the excessively voluminous communications about deliverables and price haggling with this person, I stand by my decision to refuse to field more e-mails. It’s unfortunate that an alliance was not forged here.  However, when people can’t stick to what they wrote, business relationships fail.

reviews.text:
5* - if I could give more, I would. A young female, who suddenly found myself up against a HUGE organization, Ehud with Spencer Young's office went ABOVE AND BEYOND to *listen* to me tell my story.

I spent hours (literally) filling out online attorney inquiry forms. Ehud got back to me in under 4 hours with both an email and phone call. He was PATIENT in explaining legal concepts (verbiage) to me, KIND toward me and my vulnerable situation and KNOWLEDGEABLE in regards to employment/labor law. Ehud doesn't commit to something that he can't do and I appreciate that his golden word; he called when he said he would and got the answers to questions - points of clarification that he needed - as promised.

Although what I thought was a case, wasn't really a case, I feel confident and secure in the information that was relayed to me and am truly thankful and appreciative for the employment law crash-course!

Thank you Ehud!

I called Spencer Young's office to discuss an employment agreement and to advise me of my rights.  Within 24 hours, he gave me sound employment advice at an affordable price, just as advertised on his website.  He was also easy and fun to talk to.  If you need an employment attorney in Oakland, San Francisco, or anywhere in the Bay Area, I strongly recommend giving Spencer Young Law a call.

Called for help with a matter involving a former employer. Gave me excellent advice over the phone how to handle my claim. Did not have to do that. If I ever have a serious employment claim I will call Mr Young again.

Spencer Young is an employment law attorney based in Oakland.  I had a case against him recently and was very impressed by him.  He was very aggressive and clearly cared about his client.  Spencer is knowledgeable about employment law and willing to fight to the death for his clients.  As a fellow employment law attorney, I wouldn't hesitate to refer him.

Mr. Young was paid a substantial amount to represent me, failed in adequately handling my case, admitted not knowing the area of law, when i expressed concern about his failures, he quit stating we didnt get along... If you received this type of poor service, you would be upset also. Mr Young breached the contract, took my money and ran. If he had good faith, he would not have taken every payment and then quit. Mr Young's lengthy rebuttal about my feelings did not get me my money back, finish or win my case, leaving me in a worse position than when i hired him. Find yourself another lawyer; don't say you haven't been warned!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: This review is not accurate for several reasons.  First, this office took a financial loss on this case.  We worked our tails off for over a year.  This client still owes us money.  Second, this was a classic retaliation and discrimination case.  We've been doing these cases for over a decade with great results.  Please check out our other reviews.  Third, the causes of action he says we "lost" were dismissed by the judge for lack of evidence.  Not all cases and claims are winners.  We saved the parts of the case that had merit.  Fourth, we didn't "quit". We withdrew for cause because the working relationship became intolerable.  This client was impossible to work with.  Nothing we ever did was good enough. The judge granted our request to withdraw for cause for these and other reasons.  We stand by our decision to drop this client 110%.

reviews.text: Experienced, very busy, yet took time to help me evaluate whether I needed him or not. I felt lucky to find him. I wouldn't hesitate to send a friend or relative to him for employment law issues.

I came to Mr. Blalock with DUI #2 and a violation of probation from DUI#1. First DUI I had injured passengers (extreme injuries) and I was under the legal drinking age so I did jail time. So I knew for sure I would be looking at jail time for #2.

June 20, 2018 Mr. Blalock notified me that he had gotten my 2nd DUI dropped to a wet & reckless, fines cut in half, NO Jail Time, Probation re-instated (which is already expired), and the best part. . . License back same day with NO interlock device! & 12hr DUI class!!!
I couldn't be any more thankful. What I thought would turn into a 2year jail sentence and the end of my life, actually turned into a huge blessing with a Lesson Learned! & a slap on the wrist! I am so happy to say, I can now move forward with my life and put this all behind me.

reviews.text: Worked with them for over four months on my case, but in one email they decided it wasn't a good business decision to continue. That is despite giving them everything they asked for. I would not recommend this firm, and advise you work with someone else who cares about their clients.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are sorry to learn that your experience with our firm was not positive. To perform a thorough review of each potential client's case, we sometimes ask potential clients to request their personnel files from their employers. After such files are received, as long as a month after a potential client requests them, those documents and any others take time to review throughly.

We are mindful of our potential clients' time and do not wish to suggest that we will take a case simply because we ask follow up questions.

Unfortunately, we are not able to address particular questions about the merits of our potential clients’ cases – we provide legal advice once we are retained as a firm. We try to provide resources to assist anyone who contacts us in finding another firm who can assist them, as well as resources that will assist them in understanding their potential claims.

We wish you the best of luck.

reviews.text:
I was referred to this law firm by another law firm that told me they had seen this firm represent and have success with cases similar to mine (discrimination in the workplace; harassment; federal employer etc.) I had researched them and saw the great reviews so I decided to reach out for assistance but I was greatly disappointed when I finally did. According to Jane Mackie (an attorney at this firm), Bryan Schwartz Law only accepts 1-3% of the cases we present to them and when you ask why they will not represent you in a case similar to the ones they advertise representation for, you're issued a blanket statement of "it was a business decision; this should not be interpreted as expressing any view of the merits of your potential claims- I wish you the best of luck" followed by a generic link to an attorney website. It's hard not to interpret it as such when you have attorneys telling you that your case is basically not worth the hassle to them without explanation. Jane did not even have the decency to respond to my email request that she honestly explain what the problem with my case is.

I assume that if you are not a 100% slam dunk or a case that will bring them millions of dollars, they do not care about you-even if you are in their alleged target audience. Wonderful job at making the group of people you're supposed to be defending feel even worse than they did when they finally asked for help. This experience made me feel like I should just give up fighting for fair treatment in my workplace because it no longer feels plausible.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are very sorry to hear that you did not have a positive experience with our firm. We understand how stressful and challenging workplace legal issues like discrimination and harassment can be, which is why we strive to assist as many people as we can.

Unfortunately, we are not able to address particular questions about the merits of our potential clients’ cases – we provide legal advice once we are retained as a firm. To be clear, the employment cases we take, and employment cases generally, are never “100% slam dunk” and most of the cases we do take are not going to “bring us millions of dollars.” We do our best to determine which cases will be a good fit for our team. We try to provide resources to those fighting legal battles that we are unable to assist with, where we can identify some. We wish you the best of luck in your matter, should you choose to pursue it.

reviews.text:

After repeatedly hearing “there’s nothing we can do”, “I’m so sorry but we can’t help you” over and over form his employer whom he dedicated over 40 years of his life to, Bryan assured me that his firm could help, and help they did. Everything changed the moment they took over, and for the better, having them deal with both his employer and the insurance company made our lives completely stress free!
Both he and his staff were extremely helpful in the process, not only in helping me understand what information was needed but very helpful in explaining the process. I’d also like to send a special thank you to DeCarol Davis who I worked with, she went above and beyond to help in this very complex situation.
If you ever find yourself needing legal help in this area, you’d be lucky to have Bryan and his staff on your side!

I hired a business attorney a few years ago to compose an agreement for my business Web Revamp to hire contractors. That document is over 20 pages long with a separate agreement and NDA. It is hard for me to understand the implications of a lot of the legal ease. I used the document once with much futzing and discomfort, and I found it hard to use again for a different type of contractor. I paid almost $2,000 for that document and it felt like a waste.

I explained to Brian what I was going through and the types of contractors we engage.

I was happily surprised to read the replacement document he composed. I read it in one sitting, and I understood what it covered well enough to ask clarifying questions. He not only composed a much shorter document, he integrated the NDA and then explained how to customize for different contractors. To top it off, the cost was less than half what I paid the first attorney. I’m very happy with it!

If you own a new business and you want to get your agreements in order and you need advice, I highly recommend Brian Ripley. Not only is he good at what he does, he is friendly and welcoming.

Don't believe all the positive reviews you read here on this site or any other review site. Do more research and don't rely on just written reviews. I recommend you go to the court and sit and listen to one of Robert Tayac's defense cases. You will see for yourself that you would be wasting your money on poor representation and a real lack of commitment from this law office to defend your case. Robert Tayac may tell you what you want to hear and  he may have you believe that he will work hard to fight for you. But after you pay him your money, then you will see just how important you really are to him.  It appears that Robert is more interested in taking your money and overcharging you for his services while delivering on a very mediocre effort of client defense. His services and idea of client defense consist of carrying out normal  court formalities while standing tall by your side in the courtroom. It might make you feel good because you have a lawyer by your side and that you paid a lot of money for your defense. But you will clearly come to realize that you would be no better off than if you represented yourself or went with a public defender instead. Please  don't waste your  hard earned money! And please don't drink and drive! I feel it is my duty to give you those two best advice.  If  you have a drinking problem, then you should reach out and get help. Take responsibility for your mistakes and don't  burden your family with more dept by overpaying for a lawyer that is only interested in enriching himself from your misfortunes or bad decisions. You have been  warned. Take care and I wish you well. Only honesty truly pays in the long run.

reviews.text:
When a super big tech giant branded my firing a ‘layoff due to business need,’ it was no routine cut—it was a savage wrongful termination, a brutal attempt to bury my retaliation charges under their corporate muck. I’d blown the whistle loud and clear on their rot.They thought they’d silence me. I was a wildfire of rage, splintered and raw, teetering on collapse—until Vincent blazed in like a righteous inferno.
Vincent didn’t blink. I shoved a mountain of documents into his grip—emails, complaints, a raw ledger of their sins—and he ripped through them with a lion’s savage hunger. He tore their ‘restructuring’ lie to ribbons, swinging pretext law like a molten blade to prove my firing was a sham to muzzle my cries. With California’s Fair Employment and Housing Act (FEHA) as his war hammer, he crushed them for retaliating against my stand. Then he unleashed the FMLA like a lightning strike, blasting their denial of my arrangement recommended by my doctor, and laid me off without placement amid their emotional torment, a campaign of abuse that left me reeling while they smirked.
For months, Vincent waged war against their gleaming pack of suits, a lone titan toppling their machine. In the end, he didn’t just win—he obliterated, forging a settlement that slammed them with a favorable settlement—a radiant prize clawed from their grasping hands. It wasn’t just money; it was justice, molten and unyielding, a roaring testament to their defeat. A middle finger to their arrogance. Furthermore, Vincent also made sure hold the tech giant accountable, should they make any disparage statement towards me in the future.
Vincent didn’t just take my case—he carried my banner, fighting like my wounds were his own. He didn’t just lift me from the ruin; he raised a blazing monument of victory over it. If a tech behemoth has trampled your rights with filth and fury, Vincent Tong will wield the law like a cyclone and roar until they kneel.
Vincent Tong is also very tech savvy, and used that to streamline and manage documents. This proved to be very efficient and convenient in managing my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Z.W, thank you for sharing your experience in such a powerful way. We know how overwhelming it can feel to take on a large tech employer, and we’re glad our advocacy and strategy helped bring both justice and closure. At TONG LAW, we are committed to protecting employees’ rights in wrongful termination, retaliation, and discrimination matters, and it means a great deal to know our work made a difference. We appreciate your trust and recommendation.
Thank you for your 5-star rating! We appreciate your support and are proud to provide trusted employment and business law counsel to our clients.

reviews.text: Great experience overall. I was working with Keenan Webb, who was great to work with in every way. The pricing was incredibly fair, and drove me to work with this firm overall other firms. I was offered a lower price conditional upon whether the case would get dismissed in the next two hearings, and offered a higher flat rate if the case continued beyond the second court date. The case was dismissed at the second court date, so I was able to save a lot of money. Not only was Keenan informative, proactive, and professional, but he also knew the district attorney personally and was able to explain the whole situation to the DA and receive the attention and consideration I would have hoped my attorney would receive. This lead to a very favorable offer for dismissal which was a best case scenario outcome. I would highly recommend anyone to work with this firm, and with Keenan specifically.

reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience with the team at Silver Law Firm and highly recommend them. What may seem like a simple misunderstanding with law enforcement can easily turn into a complicated problem with long-lasting consequences, so the best thing to do is get an expert team on your side quickly.

Most of my case was handled by Attorney Keenan Webb. Keenan is very skilled and experienced and knew all the right things to do to solve the problem. It was amazing to see how efficiently and thoroughly he worked, while juggling many cases/clients simultaneously. I always felt like he had my best interest in mind, was respectful, realistic, professional, and had great communication throughout.

I also worked with Attorneys Elliot Silver and Marshall Hammons at various stages in the process and their expertise was incredibly important and made a huge difference.  Elliot, Marshall, and Keenan each have different strengths and areas of specialization that they bring to the table, so together they are a legal "dream team." My first conversation with Elliot set the tone for the entire case - they fight to win, nothing less.

Keep in mind that the so-called justice system is a disgusting bureaucracy, generally designed to inflict pain and suffering on the poorest and most marginalized in society. It is deliberately slow, stacked against the defendant, riddled with inaccuracies and "mistakes," and outcomes are seldom fair or just. You will be presumed guilty and your punishment will begin before you are even charged with anything. You will get discouraged throughout the process. Just try to be patient and know that Silver Law Firm knows the process and trust their guidance. Ask a lot of questions and do your own research as well. Also, keep in mind there are limits to what is possible - they are lawyers, not magicians.

George Bernard Shaw said, "Never wrestle with a pig. You get dirty, and besides, the pig likes it." When you don't have a choice, I highly recommend you let Silver Law Firm fight for you. It is worth every penny.

reviews.text: Truly horrible experience. Wasted $5000 on a laywer that wouldn't answer or return my calls. Service began decent and under the impression it would be handled by one attorney, and was handed around between 3 different attorneys without notice until landing with one. Once the last payment was received quality of service immediately declined. Could not get ahold of my attorney for weeks at a time despite trying to reach out through phone AND email. When I questioned this I was responded to in the way of an offended child, a lot of unjust finger pointing and a total lack of anything even resembling accountability. My experience was entirely opposite of the mission statement on the website. I have accomplished more headway in just ONE court date with a public defender than in 7 months with this law firm. I would suggest weighing options heavily before working out a large sum of money to a group of attorneys whose only concern, in my opinion, seems to be financial gain and not the wellbeing of its clients. I wish you all better a better legal experience than I had.
reviews.ownerResponse: Unfortunately I am prohibited by the ethical rules of confidentiality to tell you anything about how or why this person found themselves in this predicament. reviews.text:
I would strongly warn anyone against hiring Silver Law Firm. My family hired them for my case, and the experience was nothing short of a disaster.

Initially, Attorney Keenan promised to handle everything, including my bail. He visited me in jail and assured me that bail would be processed. However, on the court date, he suddenly changed his strategy, claiming filing a motion would be better. I agreed. But two days later, his colleague, Marshall, informed me they wouldn't file for bail at all, without any reasonable explanation.

What's worse, Keenan completely ignored my family's attempts to communicate with him, despite me giving full consent for them to discuss my case. They were unresponsive and unprofessional throughout.

This firm is deceitful -- they promise the world to get your money, then fail to deliver. After taking my payment, they backed out on filing the bail motion, leaving me in the lurch. I understand outcomes aren't always in our control, but they didn't even make the effort they promised.

Avoid Silver Law Firm at all costs. They prey on vulnerable families, take your money, and leave you stranded with no real legal support.

Wish the tool could let me select '0' rating cause that's what they deserve!!!

reviews.text: Eric deserves more than just 5 stars. If you have any doubts or concerns he will answer them professionally and courteously. All the while make you feel comfortable with your decision.

Eric is the best! I had 2 other lawyers try and fix my tax issues but ended up just taking my money. Eric was honest, upfront and transparent about everything and fixed my problem! He explained the process very thoroughly and answer all my questions along the way with my Ch 13 BK. If you want an honest, fair attorney Eric is your guy!

Eric is the one. You may stop your search for a lawyer. He's kind, takes an interest in how you're doing on a personal level; he's like a friend. He makes the process easy and doable, and very digestible to understand. He does this work from the heart, and it reflects in his conduct. He truly does want to assist people in improving their livelihoods and getting their lives back on track. He will go above and beyond, and he deserves all the praise that I can lavish upon him. Thank you, Eric, for improving my life buddy. :)

Eric Boeing has changed my life. Filing for bankruptcy was easily one of the most emotional times of my life. It’s not something anyone ever hopes or plans to do. I was stuck at a crossroads between two chapters of bankruptcy. One was less favorable and I did not want to pursue, however, I was advised that it was the only viable option by many different lawyers.

From my first interaction with Eric, I could immediately feel this was different. Rather than ask for a summary of my finances during a rushed initial consultation, he requested all documents prior to our actual meeting. He was able to grasp the complexities of my case and advise me honestly and kindly, all while displaying a true passion of helping people regain control of their finances. There was never any pressure to immediately start the case, it was all based on my comfortability level. It took me about a year to move forward and during that timeframe he readily assisted me on the countless questions I had.

Now comes the tricky part, the actual filing. Eric meticulously went over all details, outlined all possible outcomes and kept a calm demeanor throughout the process. There was one particular instance, where I had felt defeated and unsure of myself, but Eric empathetically reached out to provide reassurance immediately after. That gesture restored my confidence that I was making the right decision.

Months later, I have received the final paperwork. I was able to file in the chapter I had hoped for and based on his hard work, due diligence and attention to detail, I obtained the best possible outcome in my situation. I could not recommend his services enough. He has truly changed my financial future. I look forward to rebuilding my financial portfolio to utilize his estate planning services to ensure financial peace of mind.

We engaged Eric's services in preparation of our living trust. He was thoughtful, helpful, and professional. He has a manner that is both commanding and calming, which is exactly what's needed to make it through this process. We trusted that he knew what he was doing, that he would not lead us astray, and that he truly cared that we got the outcomes we wanted and needed. Eric made what could be a very unpleasant thought-process as easy as possible, while ensuring we (and our assets) are thoroughly protected.

I had the great pleasure of working with Eric Boeing on my bankruptcy case. I found him to be warm, professional, and pro-active, keeping me informed every step of the way. And, months after the case, he continues to keep me informed about ongoing issues. I am happy to recommend Eric Boeing, without reserve. Five Stars.

We had the opportunity to work with Eric during this year's shelter-in-place. He was responsive, personable and professional throughout our engagement, which was a comfort under the present circumstances. We would work with Eric again without hesitation and recommend his legal services.

Eric completed a Will and Trust for my wife and me during the Shelter-In-Place. He met with us over Zoom and was very thorough in his explanations of the process and what we need to have in place. He also did a great job listening to specific concerns and desires and incorporating those in our documents.  He even came over to our house so we could sign the documents outside.

He was thorough, quick, and responsive to us and our needs. I have already recommended Eric to family and friends.

Review written in Feb 2015:

I just want to thank Eric so much for all of his help with our case. My husband and I have always been the type of couple that has always wanted things to go right for us, keeping everything in order, including our finances, and we have always done pretty well up until a few years ago. It was so devastating learning how negative our credit would be after all of our financial woes, especially after having kept it clean for so many years. I just wanted to take this time and opportunity to express and share that during our time of hardship and us eagerly and desperately wanting to get back on our feet, having gone through the many sacrifices to make that happen, Eric has been so professional, helpful, knowledgeable, and positive. It's already devastating when you're dealing with every negative thing thrown at you, but it really helps to meet others that truly understand your situation, and genuinely goes the extra steps to help in every way that they can. Eric made the process as smooth as possible, even with our case being a more complicated case.  My husband and I  truly appreciate Eric for making us feel like humans again, helping us tremendously to understand each and every step of the process, as well as helping us to realize that our situation is only temporary. He has proven that he really wants to help others, and he has. We highly recommend his services. Thanks Eric!"

Update in March 2020:

So we have completed our case (5 years later) since 2015 and I would not change anything I posted in my previous review. Eric is the best attorney we have ever worked with since day 1, and we definitely recommend his services. Thank you Eric for being so professional and thorough in all of your explanations about our case, and getting us through such a difficult time. You kept us updated every step of the way and you are so prompt with your email responses. You are truly appreciated, and we will contact you in the future if needed. We have already referred others to you. Thank you for being you. We will keep in touch!

I absolutely cannot express how truly grateful I am that I found this amazing man.  Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!  This was my first time filing bankruptcy, so I went on Yelp, read the reviews and found Eric.  I was dealing with a lot of shame and confusion, and Eric had quickly put me at ease.  Not once did he ever judge me or make me feel less than.  He was so kind, patient and extremely thorough through this whole process.  He is so knowledgeable and always responded to my emails and calls in a timely manner.  It was an absolute honor having Eric represent me.  Eric is hands down at the top of his field.  Eric, thank you so much.  I really and truly appreciate YOU and who YOU are!

I've worked with Eric over a number of years. He has always been attentive and responsive to my case as it has evolved. In my estimation, Eric is an expert in his craft. This is the baseline I would seek in an attorney. But Eric goes far beyond this qualification in terms of his interaction with his clients, if I may generalize from my experience (and I  believe I can). He is sincere in his desire for a favorable outcome; he is scrupulous in responding rapidly to queries and concerns; he displays a sense of social justice. To use an old-fashioned term, he is a gentleman. The best compliment I can give!

Eric is fantastic. I felt anxious and unsure about the whole process, I called him up, and we did a free consultation out in Oakland. Honestly, for something as intimidating as bankruptcy, Eric made the whole process feel way better. He knows what he is doing, he tries to make the call based on if it sounds right for you, and seems to really care about his clients. We completed the whole process and I couldn't be more thankful. If you're worried and want to work with someone who genuinely comes off like they care, I can't recommend a better person. I only had to meet up with him physically three times over this whole proceeding and each time was a pleasure. There was absolutely no pressure on his end and I couldn't have hired a better attorney for this.

For something that is so private & personal, Eric handled everything with confidence & ease.  His honest, straightforward way of presenting things helped in making this very stressful time so much easier. I too looked to Yelp & Google for referrals & was so happy with Eric and the work he did. I HIGHLY recommend Eric Boeing he is one of the good guys!!
Eric is an excellent bankruptcy attorney. He is knowledgable about bankruptcy matters. When I have questions with such issues, I don't hesitate to call him. He is also personable and friendly.

Clayton is one phenomenal attorney! He is ABSOLUTE THE BEST! In 2019, I experienced a slip and fall incident that significantly impacted my life. Initially, I faced immense challenges as no attorney was willing to take my case, and the insurance company's meager offer of $10,000 barely covered my medical expenses. However, my fortunes changed when I met Pete, a personal injury attorney whose dedication and commitment to justice stood out from the rest.
Pete was the only attorney courageous enough to take on my challenging case. From the outset, he and his assistant, Debby, provided unparalleled support and guidance. They were not just legal representatives; they were compassionate allies who genuinely cared about my well-being and fought tirelessly for my rights.
Thanks to Pete's expertise and relentless perseverance, we achieved a monumental victory—a $260,000 settlement that far exceeded my expectations. This settlement has not only helped cover my medical costs but also provided me with the financial security to move forward in life.
Pete's approach to my case was nothing short of extraordinary. He went above and beyond what I believed was possible for an attorney. His strategic thinking, empathy, and unwavering support throughout the legal process were instrumental in securing a favorable outcome.
I am immensely grateful to Pete and Debby for their exceptional service and support. Debby, in particular, deserves a special mention for her diligent work, which undoubtedly contributed to the positive resolution of my case. It's clear that their combined efforts stem from a genuine desire to help those in need.
To anyone facing personal injury challenges, I wholeheartedly recommend Pete and his team. They are not just attorneys; they are life-changers who will stand by you every step of the way. Thank you, Pete and Debby, for everything you have done. Your hard work and dedication have truly made a difference in my life.

reviews.text:
Pete and his team were really great. I took a year to decide to sue. One year remained on the clock to file a suit for my motorcycle - car accident. The police report was non-committal on fault despite three witnesses whose statements matched mine. I used my legal benefits program at work. Read some reviews and testimonials on Pete's site and decided to give him a try. I sent an email through their online form at 4:11pm on a Monday. (I'm looking at the email as I write this.) Pete responded at 4:17! Obviously he wasn't with a client at the time. By 4:30 I had left a message with the office to schedule an appointment per his instructions

The next morning, at 9:07, Vanessa asked the office and me via email, if anyone had responded to me. They are really responsive and on top of things. She then saw my voice message. Pete and I talked briefly on the phone and I scheduled a face-to-face, as he prefers that. We met in two days.

Pete was friendly, helpful, clear. He struck me as honest and competent. He laid out the possibilities. He did not over-promise.

We were in contact on months 1, 4, 5 ,6, 10, and 12. Pete advised patience and I did my best to just let him and his office do the case in their time and style. I was a bit anxious nothing would come of it as the clock ticked down. We had a pathetic offer in month 6. But they were still fighting for me. We ended up with a surprisingly good settlement. Pete, Kevin, and Vanessa were great to work with. I've referred others to him. On this Thanksgiving Day, I say, thank you, Pete et al.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow! Thanks, Mark! Happy Thanksgiving to you as well. Thank you for the kind words and for having the patience it sometimes takes to get favorable results. We look forward to more pictures from the road!

I was recommended to talk with Pete Clancy by a close coworker.  That recommendation set me at ease because I knew she wouldn’t steer me wrong. And since I was having to deal with all sorts of matters pertaining to my accident, that helped me square away a huge chunk of relief. Relief that someone very responsible and knowledgeable would be on my side. You see,  I was the pedestrian that was hit by a car while walking in the crosswalk.

Even though Clancy & Diaz is located in Walnut Creek, Pete kindly agreed to came down to Santa Clara where I live to meet with me since I was incapacitated and was not able to bear any weight on my leg for seven weeks. At the time,  even getting into a car meant taking the wheelchair and putting on my brace to travel any distance. All of that would have been very taxing and wearing on my injured body.

How kind it was of him to come to Santa Clara to meet with me to discuss my case, to give me the consultation in person in my home since I was basically couch bound.

Pete has such a personable manner about him. He actively listens and shows genuine sincerity in his words and in his actions.   My niece, who was in town from Ohio and helping to take care of me thought Pete was engaging,  straightforward and very knowledgeable.

Pete was the liaison, the conduit that helped deal with my medical bills, the car insurance company’s and all the paperwork.  He fought for me even when I was willing to give up.

I was always able to reach him by email, phone  or text message.  He helped me receive the best claims settlement  possible.  I can’t say enough superlatives about the way he handled my case and how he made me feel more than just another client but as an individual that he lavished his time and attention on.

Take it from someone who’s been there...You can’t go wrong with Clancy & Diaz on your side.
