I sought out legal advice regarding a long-time issue with my apartment’s elevator. You see, it’s always broken. And the permit is out of date. I’ve tried for years to get them to replace the elevator but it seems they’ve made a business decision to never replace it. So my neighbors and I suffer for it, frequently.

I recently decided I’ve had enough. I was angry. So I called Tobener to get guidance on how to fight back. They answered on the second ring and a lovely intake member got my basic info down. A couple hours later that day, an attorney called me back. Her name is Iris Wagner. She actually listened to what I had to say and shared my fire to do something about it. She looked into the issue and just one day later, called me back with a thorough analysis of my options. She talked me out of the more aggressive approaches, which was smart because she helped me see the potential shortcomings of my considered course of action. Instead we found more impactful, less risky, options which I am now pursuing.

I felt heard, cared about and educated. Iris Wagner is a sensational lawyer and her team is clearly operating smoothly. I’ll add too, they were the only firm out of three to call me back! I give this firm my FULL ENDORSEMENT

Dealing with a non legal 60 days notice from an ex-Roomate I trusted who kept the lease for more than 20 years without living in my space , I called Tobener Ravenscroft and the staff was very helpful and got me in touch with Tobin Lim. He call me and emailed me advices promptly and clearly about my situation  as as it was developping. Thank you !

I have been dealing with a frustrating situation with a home that I am renting. I have been going back and forth with the property manager to try to resolve an issue for 8 months. Finally I had enough and decided to look for legal assistance. After seeing so many positive reviews, I decided to reach out to Tobener Ravenscroft. I had a phone call with Christina Collins and she gave me such awesome advice! She was very thorough; she answered all of my questions, told me what my rights were, gave me specific code violations to site, and help with language to send to the property manager. Her advice was great! I finally have some action from the property manager and hopefully my issue will be resolved quickly. Thank you for all of your help, Christina!!

Toven and crew were amazing through the entire experience. Very professional and took time to really listen and work together on each step. I highly recommend them to anyone! Not only good at what they do but also just good people.

Wrongful Eviction in Los Angeles County. Many working parts. This firm knows how to handle it! They are true specialists. And above all, they tell you what to expect realistically. Many lawyers out there on the landlord side. Just a few on the tenant side. If you are a short changed and or wrongfully evicted tenant, call these people! Thanks so much Allyson, Lilli & Sarah

“I had an excellent experience working with TOBENER RAVENSCROFT on my case. Their team is professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly supportive.

A special thanks to Georgia Staples for her guidance and hard work throughout the process. I also want to specifically recognize Sarah McCraken, whose expertise and attention to detail were instrumental in achieving a positive outcome.

I felt confident and well-represented every step of the way. I highly recommend this law firm to anyone seeking top-notch legal assistance.”
legal assistance.”

I highly recommend Tobener and Ravenscroft.  My case was tough and everyone on the team worked diligently and professionally to get me a settlement that I deserved.  We need more law firms like this who will fight against unjust landlords. A big thank you to attorneys Sarah and Joe and paralegal Matt for all of your dedication and hard work.  I am forever grateful for your expertise and help!

TOBENER has been a Great Source in helping me through this difficult time, they have warmth and true concern to go along with there professionalism! They go above and beyond leaving NO STONES UNTURNED. If you need legal help in this category don't look any further! You've found the RIGHT ONES!

After the pandemic. I received three eviction notices from the former landlord after being a perfect tenant for over 10 years. I was disparate and hopeless not knowing what to do. I was still in college finishing up my last semester. I had nowhere to go and could not find another unit available in the area. It was winter, it was cold and it was the holidays. I started calling around to find an attorney in town. I would ask if they were experts in tenant law and many attorneys were not. My good friend was an attorney, but he is not an expert in tenant’s law.  I found a local attorney to go to court and fight the unlawful detainer case against me. I continued to research online for tenant’s attorneys. I found their website by accident. I reach out to Tobener Ravenscroft and paid for a 30 min phone consultation. I was very happy that now I had some guidance to fight the unlawful detainer case. My evictions case was ongoing thru July 2, 2022 to July 31, 2023, 12 months of trauma and harassment none stop. The landlord represented to the court her direct family was moving in. I had no choice but to move out. Six weeks after I moved out, a “For Rent” sign went up and a new tenant soon moved in for a higher rental amount than I was paying. So, I again contacted Tobener Ravenscroft for the second time asking if they would represent me and file a lawsuit against the former landlord for wrongful eviction and harassment! Five weeks ago, we reach a settlement. I'm very happy for their amazing guidance and professional representation. I would like to say thank you to Joe and Emily for their amazing teamwork! I would highly recommend them to any tenant who needs help. If anyone has a similar situation like mine, wrongful eviction or harassment you should contact this firm. Thank you once again to Joe and Emily! Keep up the amazing work!
Toven Lim was fantastic. Diligently and meticulously examined our situation and provided invaluable insight. We could not have navigated this situation without him. Highly recommend!

They do not work on unlawful detainers . I asked what do you guys work on to support your clients and the receptionist told me “we work on buy out cases for tenants and some disputes between landlords and tenants. We do not work on unlawful detainers”Still not specifying how they could help. Seems like a company that just wants your money and doesn’t care to help unless there is a large lump some of money in it for them. I give two stars only because the receptionist was at least straightforward about it .

Sarah McCracken and Jacqueline and Ravenscroft  are two of the best women and lawyers that I have had to privileged to meet. Sarah worked so hard on my case and got me a good help if you ever need any help a bad landlord no further and get them. Thank you, Sarah, Jacqueline, and team for all your help.

Update**

Although they couldn’t take my case because it’s not what they do but she offered a complimentary call which I am thankful for.

Thanks Tina

Tobener Ravenscroft was recommended to me when I needed expert help with a dispute with my landlord regarding tenant’s rights. It was a very stressful time since I was out of town when the unlawful acts occurred. Their quick responses and knowledgeable advice helped me through the next nine months. Rebekah and Julia were the best team ever. They were anlways available to answer my questions and walk me through the up and coming. There is no way I could have had the successful outcome on my own. This was my first experience hiring a lawyer and I am grateful it was this firm. I appreciate their hard work and expertise. Now that the mediation is over, I have my life back.

I am so very thankful for Tobener Ravencroft who I affectionately call my " A-Team". The entire team is top notch! They are not only professional, extremely knowledgeable about tenant protection laws, they are beyond compassionate and kind. No one ever wants to be in a vulnerable position with their landlord. But if you find yourself in such a position, do not hesitate to reach out to them. It was clear to me from the very first call/consultation that they understood my situation and wanted nothing more than to help me get to a just resolution. Their communication was clear every step of the way. And they did a wonderful job helping to set expectations. I am overjoyed with the results of my case and now have closure. Tobener Ravencroft, you are forever my earth angels.

I want give a big thank you to the team if you’re looking I recommend them 100% I couldn’t do it without them I’m so so grateful because I was so stressed out about everything my landlord put us though and after little over a year we won the settlement like more then I ever expected thank you again !!!!

Our family and I are so Blessed to have received the services of Tobener Ravenscroft Tenant Lawyers.

After 19 years as tenants renting a rather ok apartment, we got an illegal eviction. I felt scared, anxious and very stressed not knowing where my family and I would be able to rent a new place.  I was hesitant at first to pursue legal action because it would add to my already high levels of stress, and making this decision was hard but choosing Tobener Ravenscroft was the best thing ever!  I want to thank Ms. Julia Wobbe, our assigned attorney, she is very professional, supportive, and understanding. Ms. Wobbe's patience is incredible, her law practice is what makes Tobener Ravenscroft firm the one to select if you have been wrongly evicted!  My family and I won a great settlement due to the hard work that Tobener Ravenscroft team has done;  Thank you for all the good work you do in the world!

I am so grateful to have found Tobener and Ravenscroft when my family was in need. We went through a stressful, unfair and unlawful eviction, which ended up being some of the hardest times of our lives as parents of young special needs children. I was hesitant at first to pursue legal action as I though it would add to my stress, but now looking back I can say it was absolutely worth it, and it even was an empowering process. Jacqueline Ravenscroft and her team made the whole journey as smooth and stress-free as possible. They are supportive, compassionate, highly knowledgable and skilled, and just simply fantastic at their jobs. My family now has a priceless gift, which is housing security, thanks to the work of this firm. Thank you for all the good work you do in the world!

Tobener and Ravenscroft are a professional law firm committed to excellence. They truly helped my family against an unfair and unjust landlord who would not repair the property. And I am glad to say that they helped us to win a justified case. I have nothing but respect, gratitude and thanks. To Tobener and Ravenscroft. Thank you Mrs Jackie and Mrs Julie your work is outstanding and as well as Mr Ricardo and Ms Elizabeth you are all amazing and outstanding thank you for your legal counsel and support and of course for winning my case . Thank you.
My family and I were going through a difficult period and needed some help. With this firm we felt that we were heard and understood. I recommend them if you are going through any legal issues.

When a crisis happens it's difficult to sort through your thoughts and the trauma, never mind the details of essential aspects of the situation. My husband was seriously injured in a hot water heater accident. This took place in a shoddy rental that we moved into at the start of the pandemic. We needed help immediately and I was worried that we had no one to turn to.

I had never considered calling a lawyer in my life because any conflict I had ever encountered was negotiable to some degree. As my husband was lying in a hospital bed and I was staying in a hotel room with our three disabled kids, our landlord was suggesting we call the Red Cross and shelters to get help. He refused to help us and didn’t care that this wasn’t an inconvenience as he described it, but rather a horrifying life changing event. It rapidly became apparent that we would get no extension of concern or care for a situation that he created.

When I called Tobener Ravenscroft I was devastated that we found ourselves in such a bind with so much hanging precariously in the balance. I was scared because we knew my husband would never work in his chosen career again and he had sustained life altering injuries. The implications were far reaching. While the injuries and the cause of such were apparent, I’d had little time to think about all the egregious code violations that led to the situation. I figured this was a tenancy issue somehow so I decided to start with lawyers who dealt with just that.  I found Tobener Ravenscroft law offices through a search. Their reviews were very good and I took a leap of faith because I didn't know what the alternative was, but I was certain it was less than favorable. I am so grateful that I did.

The process began with Jackie Ravenscroft coming out to inspect the property. She came with compassion, understanding and keen legal knowledge. She quickly sent out someone to take a record of the code violations and to contain the amount of damage the landlord could do had he gotten wind of us seeking legal counsel. With that information they took on our tenancy case. The injury case was a separate case and they referred us to another law firm who took over the injury side. They worked in conjunction  to make sure that there was a solid flow of information and so that we had the most optimal chance of winning both suits.

Allyson Murphy, who is a Senior Associate, finished our tenancy case and we won. She was proactive, mindful and communicative. I can't say how much we appreciated her attitude towards the case and her hard work.

We all know that lawyers too have a vested interest in winning, but the reality is that their job has an underrepresented and unseen value. They are able to hold people's and corporations proverbial feet to the fire in a way that I or the average person  can not. Their work continues to shore up the living legal framework that gives meaningful context to the tenant/landlord relationship. As tenants we all should be certain that our rent money is spent on a home where we live safely and with dignity. I firmly believe that winning the case was important, but so was standing  by the principle that money should never trump anyone’s  safety and wellbeing. Tobener Ravenscroft, and particularly Allyson, absolutely  earned the money they argued for because they believe in that ideal. It was money well spent.

We are so grateful for Tobener Ravenscroft and attention we were given. We are even more grateful to Allyson for pushing through to the end. We now have some measure of peace and we can move on with our lives.

Recommended by a friend.
A great experience considering the situation we were in, we ended up settling out of court for a more equitable amount.
Very satisfied with all aspects of the process.
Great team to work with.

Hands down best law firm in the Bay Area!! They truly champion and fight for all of their clients. There's no better hands to be in than theirs. Jacqueline Ravenscroft and her team are very personable and  knowledgeable. They kept us informed every step of the way. Truly no better team. Thanks for everything.

Dealing with a bad landlord is really the worst.  Navigating the law is a landmine even for highly functioning individuals.  Working with the attorneys at Tobener Ravenscroft (Shari and Jackie) made me feel safe and heard.  They are pros who operate with integrity and transparency.  I highly recommend them to anyone who is having any issues with their landlord!

Tobener Ravenscroft is a top-notch, professional tenant law firm. During the pandemic our landlord moved in tenants who operated multiple illegal businesses in their apartment. I had never experienced living next to this type of activity. We discovered their social media was used primarily for advertising to host parties, provide female escort services, gambling/entertainment and other operations that could generate money in their apartment. Without getting into all the details, I can say we felt extremely unsafe and disturbed by these activities. Law enforcement could only do so much, ultimately it came down to our landlord who continued to look the other way and let us suffer living next to this insanity.

We reached out to city officials, law enforcement and other law firms to seek advice on how to proceed with our landlord and nuisance neighbors and Ravenscroft was there to help right from the get go.  Jim Lucey is a very professional and knowledgeable lawyer who stuck by our side through the whole process. He had great communication and was fighting for us beginning to end. If you’re having issues with your landlord or neighbors, before you pack up and move, It might be worth your time to reach out to a law firm for some advice. I highly recommend Tobener Ravenscroft and Jim Lucey.

It was absolutely a pleasure working with this law firm. When my wife reached out to them we didn't know where to turn, and we were initially just trying to get some help. Trusting the process led us to an outcome that I myself didn't imagine going into it all.

Their staff was courteous, knowledgeable, and really led us every step of the way. I honestly would recommend them to anyone that needed legal support.

I'm more than happy with them and wouldn't trade the experience for any other.
Excellent service. Sound advice on CA tenants rights and landlord responsibilities. Highly recommend.

Tobener Ravenscroft law firm is the real deal. Like many others, my roommate and I were faced with a case of wrongful eviction. We were anxious about our recourse and unsure of how to proceed. Thankfully, we reached out to the team at Tobener Ravenscroft. We initially detailed our circumstances to the firm. They assessed our situation and came to an agreement that we had been wronged and had a valid reason to file. They made it assuredly clear we would NOT have to pay for anything out of pocket, and that the firm would only take a percentage fee if we were awarded recompense from the opposing party.

Throughout the course of the suit, I had the absolute pleasure of working with Julia Wobbe and Tiffany Moyes. Julia and Tiffany are true professionals. They helped us to organize documentation of our circumstances and guide us through interactions with our landlords. They laid out expectations and timelines at every step of the journey, from filing to potential trial. At all times, Julia and Tiffany were attentive, clear, and thorough in their responses to questions we posed (and we had many).

Additionally, though this will not be the case for everyone, I think it is important to highlight for those in a similar situations; Julia and Tiffany were receptive and conscientious of our desires and inputs when it came to our stance towards the opposing counsel.  Our situation involved a landlord that had wronged us but was not malevolent. We did not want to see them go broke, just to be fairly compensated in response to their wrong doings. Julia was fair in her assessments and requests and did not go over the top simply to accrue more damages and seek more money. It is clear to me that the people at Tobener Ravenscroft are there to help their clients first, and I could not recommend a better firm.

During a time when our landlord treated us with no humility or empathy, we were facing landlord harassment and wrongful eviction. But then we found hope with Tobener and Ravenscroft, who believed we had a case.

We were fortunate to work with an amazing team consisting of Georgia Staples, Julia Wobbe, and Adrian Slipski. They showed immense empathy, understanding, and relatability towards our situation. They asked for precise information, and were always helpful when we had any questions or concerns. They were also highly communicative throughout this tribulating process, making us feel comfortable, safe, and secure during a very new and unfamiliar experience.

We are forever grateful to everyone at this firm for their validation and help. Thank you!

I cannot recommend Tobner Ravenscroft highly enough! When my roommates and I found ourselves dealing with an illegal eviction and harassment case from our landlord, we had no idea where to turn. But working with these lawyers made all the difference.

From the very beginning, Georgia Staples, Julia Wobbe, and Adrian Slipski were incredibly helpful, communicative, and understanding. They took the time to listen to our story and made sure every detail was documented and presented to the defense and our landlord. As first-time tenants dealing with a situation like this, we truly appreciated the way they walked us through every step of the process.

Ultimately, thanks to their hard work and expertise, we won our case and received a settlement that exceeded our expectations. But even more than the financial outcome, it was the validation and peace of mind we felt from working with such dedicated and genuine lawyers that has helped us move on from this difficult experience.

If you're a tenant dealing with a difficult or unreasonable landlord, don't hesitate to contact Tobner Ravenscroft. You won't regret it!
Julia was quick to respond and provided some peace of mind during a stressful disagreement with my landlord, as well as a lot of very helpful information.
Great lawyers, diligent and very knowledgeable with housing laws. They got me the settlement we were looking for after an illegal eviction.

Throughout our case, we felt in control. We always had great communication with our legal team. The extensive length of time this case took due to covid court delays, was a pain. Tobner Ravencroft and their legal team never wavered in their diligence or care of our case. They helped us recover from our financial losses resulting from an unlawful eviction. We are forever grateful!

I worked with Jackie, Julia, and Patricia. These ladies communicated with me so that I always knew what was happening with my case, and they explained legalese to me in a way that made me understand what was happening without making me feel stupid.

After a few years of a bad dream dealing with a horrible human being of a landlord. Allyson & Racheal are super amazing at the detail and time they put into the justice that is needed to make one feel whole. My partner and I are greatly appreciative that we had a wonderful team. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts.
Thank you so much to the entire team. You were a great help and incredibly patient with us. On behalf of my husband and myself, we are so grateful for your services. May God bless you all.

I am so glad that I chose Tobener Ravenscroft to represent me in my landlord tenant dispute. From the very first phone call to the final settlement, everyone was knowledgeable, professional and caring. I could not have asked for more. .Communication was excellent at all times. This is a top-notch firm, and I'm happy to recommend them to anyone struggling as a renter in San Francisco.

When I first contacted this office I felt they were very responsive, they follow through etc…
Of course they did because they saw the possibility of making money.

The issue happened during mediation. I felt bullied into accepting a settlement by my own attorney Toberner.  I felt abandoned by the attorney.  He even yelled at me for not following his legal advise and telling me to settle. I felt he wanted a quick payday and didn’t want to risk losing in trial because he would get zero money if we did.

In my heart I felt we had a good case.  My kids and I suffered greatly for 5 years due to our slum lord. I would not recommend this guy.  Seeing how little he cared about us that day was an eye opener.
Knowledgeable and made me feel secure about my rights as a renter. Thanks Alison M.

Joe and Melanie did a fabulous job representing us after a mold infestation in our SF apartment.  They are experts at landlord tenant law, fierce advocates for their clients, and pragmatic in their advice.  Would unequivocally recommend them to anyone!

I reached out with a brief description of my situation, but without much hope anything would come of it. They called me soon after and things were set in motion quickly. All I had to do was answer some questions or provide information here and there, and they took care of the rest. It was as painless a process as I could imagine and didn't cost me a penny. I'll likely put a down payment on a house with my settlement money; not only did they right the wrongs from my previous housing situation, but they've set me up for future homeownership.

This firm is a very professional and client-centered place for tenant who are looking for legal assistance in terms of renting places with a ESA animal in bay area.

I recently got notice from my landlord saying that if I can not provide the paper to prove my dog who is my emotional support dog is licensed, they would take away my dog and put him in a shelter or I need to pay extra money for having my dog stay with me until the paper is arrived through mail.

There is nothing wrong of asking me to submit all the paper works to prove my dog is a ESA and his is licensed but my landlord doesn't ask me those papers before I move in and after I moved in, they start to email me every day by asking me different papers about my dog and eventually they find a weakness of my documentation and start to threaten me.

Thank you for Jacqueline Ravenscroft, one of the lawyer in the company, she helps me send a letter that explains all my rights as a ESA owner to my landlord and solved this problem less than a week. Now I don't need to worry that my dog will be taking away from me or paying extra money.
It is important that my landlord will not harass me with any more emails by asking paper works or sometimes  unreasonable questions like what will you gonna do if you dog bark in the middle of night?

At last, I also got some of my deposits back since they work so efficiently.
Great free 15 minute consultation! Very helpful and professional!

My husband and I needed to terminate our lease early due to noise issues from the upstairs apartment in Oakland. We did a quick Google search and found Tobener Ravenscroft LLP. I called on one day and was able to set up an appt to speak with Allyson, who helped me draft the notice to vacate letter and negotiate getting out of the lease quickly without paying as much as we could have had to pay. This firm lives up to the hype, and I trust them to help me understand the options and choose the best one for my situation.
This is an excellent law firm that assists tenants. They are very helpful and caring!

Everyone I dealt with at Tobener Ravenscroft was so kind and helpful. They are very knowledgeable and supportive when dealing with difficult situations. I can't say enough good things about Joe, Allyson, Lilli and Tina. Thank you for being there for us.
Great advice Tina, appreciate your time.

I was recommend to this firm by a friend and I am so glad for it. They were very professional and communicative attorneys, answered all my questions and accommodated my needs. I am very appreciative of their hard work. Thank you Rachel and Pete :)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words! We are happy to be able to help.

reviews.text:
In 2019, I experienced a slip and fall incident that significantly impacted my life. Initially, I faced immense challenges as no attorney was willing to take my case, and the insurance company's meager offer of $10,000 barely covered my medical expenses. However, my fortunes changed when I met Pete, a personal injury attorney whose dedication and commitment to justice stood out from the rest.
Pete was the only attorney courageous enough to take on my challenging case. From the outset, he and his assistant, Debby, provided unparalleled support and guidance. They were not just legal representatives; they were compassionate allies who genuinely cared about my well-being and fought tirelessly for my rights.
Thanks to Pete's expertise and relentless perseverance, we achieved a monumental victory—a $260,000 settlement that far exceeded my expectations. This settlement has not only helped cover my medical costs but also provided me with the financial security to move forward in life.
Pete's approach to my case was nothing short of extraordinary. He went above and beyond what I believed was possible for an attorney. His strategic thinking, empathy, and unwavering support throughout the legal process were instrumental in securing a favorable outcome.
I am immensely grateful to Pete and Debby for their exceptional service and support. Debby, in particular, deserves a special mention for her diligent work, which undoubtedly contributed to the positive resolution of my case. It's clear that their combined efforts stem from a genuine desire to help those in need.
To anyone facing personal injury challenges, I wholeheartedly recommend Pete and his team. They are not just attorneys; they are life-changers who will stand by you every step of the way. Thank you, Pete and Debby, for everything you have done. Your hard work and dedication have truly made a difference in my life.
reviews.ownerResponse: Nina - Thank you!  This was a long, hard battle.  We are so happy it worked out to your satisfaction. These cases are rarely easy, but often very rewarding.  And we made a new friend or two on this case!

reviews.text: I was so glad to work with Pete Clancy and his staff.  You can trust Pete with his expertise, experienced and in depth knowledge in his field.  He had given me good guidance during my case.  He is very honest and approachable.  One of the staff Rachel Perez worked on my case.  She was awesome to work with and she was very friendly and helpful.  Pete had handled two of my cases.  Both of the cases outcome was phenomenal.  I was very happy with the outcome and highly recommend to work with Pete Clancy of Clancy & Diaz.

reviews.text:
Pete and his team were really great. I took a year to decide to sue. One year remained on the clock to file a suit for my motorcycle - car accident. The police report was non-committal on fault despite three witnesses whose statements matched mine. I used my legal benefits program at work. Read some reviews and testimonials on Pete's site and decided to give him a try. I sent an email through their online form at 4:11pm on a Monday. (I'm looking at the email as I write this.) Pete responded at 4:17! Obviously he wasn't with a client at the time. By 4:30 I had left a message with the office to schedule an appointment per his instructions

The next morning, at 9:07, Vanessa asked the office and me via email, if anyone had responded to me. They are really responsive and on top of things. She then saw my voice message. Pete and I talked briefly on the phone and I scheduled a face-to-face, as he prefers that. We met in two days.

Pete was friendly, helpful, clear. He struck me as honest and competent. He laid out the possibilities. He did not over-promise.

We were in contact on months 1, 4, 5 ,6, 10, and 12. Pete advised patience and I did my best to just let him and his office do the case in their time and style. I was a bit anxious nothing would come of it as the clock ticked down. We had a pathetic offer in month 6. But they were still fighting for me. We ended up with a surprisingly good settlement. Pete, Kevin, and Vanessa were great to work with. I've referred others to him. On this Thanksgiving Day, I say, thank you, Pete et al.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow! Thanks, Mark! Happy Thanksgiving to you as well. Thank you for the kind words and for having the patience it sometimes takes to get favorable results. We look forward to more pictures from the road!

reviews.text: Pete and his staff were amazing through my family difficult time. He was resourceful, informative and made sure that we had a peace of mind. I would recommend him to all my friend and family if the had car accident. Thanks, Pete for all your staffs hard work!!

reviews.text:
I was recommended to talk with Pete Clancy by a close coworker.  That recommendation set me at ease because I knew she wouldn’t steer me wrong. And since I was having to deal with all sorts of matters pertaining to my accident, that helped me square away a huge chunk of relief. Relief that someone very responsible and knowledgeable would be on my side. You see,  I was the pedestrian that was hit by a car while walking in the crosswalk.

Even though Clancy & Diaz is located in Walnut Creek, Pete kindly agreed to came down to Santa Clara where I live to meet with me since I was incapacitated and was not able to bear any weight on my leg for seven weeks. At the time,  even getting into a car meant taking the wheelchair and putting on my brace to travel any distance. All of that would have been very taxing and wearing on my injured body.

How kind it was of him to come to Santa Clara to meet with me to discuss my case, to give me the consultation in person in my home since I was basically couch bound.

Pete has such a personable manner about him. He actively listens and shows genuine sincerity in his words and in his actions.   My niece, who was in town from Ohio and helping to take care of me thought Pete was engaging,  straightforward and very knowledgeable.

Pete was the liaison, the conduit that helped deal with my medical bills, the car insurance company’s and all the paperwork.  He fought for me even when I was willing to give up.

I was always able to reach him by email, phone  or text message.  He helped me receive the best claims settlement  possible.  I can’t say enough superlatives about the way he handled my case and how he made me feel more than just another client but as an individual that he lavished his time and attention on.

Take it from someone who’s been there...You can’t go wrong with Clancy & Diaz on your side.

This is my personal experience and perspective.
EDIT: Your attempt to dismiss my review by claiming I'm not a "true consumer" is a deflection. Legal services affect more than just the paying client-they impact lives on both sides. My review reflects the real-world consequences of your advocacy, and I stand by it.
reviews.ownerResponse: We do not recognize your name; however, it is clear from what you wrote that you are not our actual client but the opposing party in an action. With that said, we understand why an opposing party wouldn't like us as we are obviously on different sides of the table, with differing opinions, and different goals. Since you weren't an actual client of our Firm, this review is not representative of how we support our actual clients; rather, it basically corroborates that we don't set out to make the other side happy. Realistically, this review should be removed because it's clearly done in spite and isn't based on a true consumer experience. We hope you feel better about your life.

reviews.text:
I would strongly encourage anyone considering Estavillo Law Group to do very careful due diligence before hiring this firm.

My experience involved significant frustration with billing practices, lack of traction on the matter, and repeated assurances that did not translate into meaningful progress. Over time, it felt like a lot of discussion without measurable movement on the case.

Communication became difficult when concerns were raised about billing and compliance with the terms of the engagement. Instead of addressing those concerns directly, the situation ultimately escalated into a dispute regarding charges.

Prospective clients should also take the time to review publicly available information regarding the firm and its leadership, including any disciplinary history listed with the State Bar of California. That information is publicly accessible and may help inform your decision before retaining counsel.

There are many capable attorneys and firms available. Based on my experience, I would personally choose a different firm if I had the opportunity to do it over again.

Jason is an outstanding real estate attorney. My case was very complicated, and he played a crucial role in working with my mortgage company and guiding me through the process. He genuinely cares about his clients and is a strong negotiator when dealing with banks and mortgage companies. I couldn’t have asked for better representation and would highly recommend him.

My husband, David and I are both thankful to have found Estavillo Law Group as a real estate attorney. Jason Estavillo acted quickly to rescue us, when a bank placed an “abstract of judgement” lien on our primary residence, at the Martinez, CA courthouse. Jason paved the way by guiding his law firm team members; Michael Arikat and Elizabeth Hurwitz,  both to immediately reach out to us! With all of their knowledge they successfully completed our case, and got us to the finish line! A full “satisfaction of judgement” was notarized by the banks’ legal counsel, and the lien was removed by our bank. We are forever grateful to Jason, Michael and Elizabeth, for saving our property from turning into a foreclosure!

Many thanks!

Jennifer & David Bravos

I strongly advise anyone considering this firm to take your case elsewhere. My experience with Estavillo Law Group has been extremely disappointing and frustrating.

The firm has a high turnover rate, which results in a lack of consistency and follow-through. Jason, the owner of the firm, has demonstrated a lack of integrity and accountability throughout the process. Our case was never finalized, and despite repeated attempts to resolve the matter, they are refusing to return our retainer.

I have made dozens of phone calls and sent multiple emails with no response. Whenever I call, I am told no one is available to speak with me, and I never receive a call back. This level of unprofessionalism is completely unacceptable for a law firm.

Due to their mishandling of our case, I have been in contact with the California Bar Association to take further action. I highly recommend finding a different law firm that will treat you and your case with the respect, transparency, and communication you deserve.

UPDATE 5 March 2025: Jason Estavillo's license has been suspended- for a second time.
OMG I found out Jason Estavillo's law license was suspended. A few years back a friend needed assistance with a loan modification so I told her I could help her out but she went to Estavillo and he just piled on the BS. Fortunately she came to her senses -- they wanted to charge her tens of thousands when you really don't need a lawyer for this. Look up any lawyers license status on the  California Bar website before hiring!

The organization, follow-up, and efficiency was EXCELLENT! Real people making actual phone calls. Honesty to the maximum. I yearn for the days when this kind of work and relationship was the norm. Cannot thank your team enough!

Very professional on all levels. When you need legal assistance with your property matters, Jason Estavillo law firm is an excellent law firm to engage with. It’s not about the money with this firm, they really care about helping you with your property matters and go above and beyond to understand your situation; starting with an initial consultation. I didn’t feel rushed and Mr Jason Estavillo offered some suggestions during the call that were extremely helpful and helped relieve some stress that I was experiencing at the time of the call. Furthermore, he offered his time again in a follow up call and I found that to be priceless because you don’t get high level legal service like that without engaging in a contract. You cannot go wrong engaging with this law firm, their legal services are worth the fees they charge.

Jason was to the point and helpful in the quick phone call we had. He offered a follow up phone call to me and I appreciate his knowledge and expertise. If we (my sisters and I) need to hire a foreclosure lawyer, I would seriously consider his services. Thank you Jason.
Honest and realistic feedback regarding their scope of capabilities as it pertained to my issue.
Very helpful consultation with Jason who offered valuable information and direction for my real estate law related needs. Extremely considerate group of attorneys who are here to help!
Amazing service and extremely helpful. I had a great experience with this whole team! The Estavillo law Group is someone I would highly recommend.

reviews.text: I couldn't ask for a more reputable attorney Jason Estavillo law firm. We  first contacted the attorneys office and spoke to Ms. Allen the relations manager. She listened attentively and understood our worries and concerns to our home being foreclosed on.   We were not aware of the loan servicer doing this  foreclosure to us, eventhough we were in review for a modification. Ocwen foreclosed on us. So consequently we had to turn for help to place a law suit on our servicer.  The office is a pleasant place with a pleasant staff that made us feel comfortable. Especially Latasha Allen relations manager, she took as much time as needed for us to go through what occurred with our loan servicer Ocwen. She understood our frustrations and concerns and was reassuring.  Plus, The office responds to our concerns in a reasonable time.  It has been a battle in dealing with being foreclosed on and the process will be ongoing to fight to stay in our home and get it back.  I feel Im in great hands with an attorney who has fought for many home owners in the Bay Area. Ive researched several attorneys and chose Mr Estavillos firm. Why? Because he and his staff cares and we are not just another number. He has taken on banks and servicers and has saved many homeowners from being foreclosed on and protected. The foreclosure  cases  speak for themselves ,refer to the cases Mr Estavillo has challenged in court and won on his website.   In my research for a law firm i wanted a reputable attorney that will do all necessary means to work in our best interest. When your dealing with constant stress ongoing it can take a toll on you not knowing the unknown.  And finding the right attorney to fight the battle for you. Mr. Estavillos firm does that and  is representation for what he stands  for respect, empathy,.and understanding  and personal attention by his office. They have made us feel comfortable and reassuring that we are in great hands and he will fight for our home.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Nichols,  Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review. We are thrilled that you are happy with your experience with our firm and we couldn't agree with you more, Latasha is a great asset to our team!  Our goal is to consistently provide the best legal service possible and to treat each client with a personalized approach, and your review affirms that we are meeting these goals.  Thank you for your kind words and we look forward to continuing our work with you to bring a positive resolution to your case.

reviews.text: They have been very helpful in all my needs. I would recommend them to anyone needing help. I would also like to commend Caitlin for how she handled all matters very professional.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your feedback, Mark.  We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with us - and we couldn’t agree with you more, Caitlin is an incredible asset to our team!

reviews.text: Great Attorney and very knowledge on Foreclosure procedures and Predatory Lending that some banks, credit unions and loan companies do . I am so grateful to have had the chance to meet him
The law offices of Mark A. Vickness have handled my cases very professionally and i am glad i found them. A++++ Service.
I wouldn't use them again. Made an appointment with Mark was handed off to Edwardo. We emailed, texted, called...no response. SLOW to respond, he seems uninterested in our case or my husband.
Decades of experience and integrity here.

Justin Chou helped me with a difficult medical/financially related problem that I'd been trying to resolve it on my own for months but was getting nowhere.  Looking back, I should've contacted CK&C far earlier because shortly after their involvement all the worry and anxiety about the situation dissolved. Excellent outcome, highly satisfied, extremely easy to work with, responsive ... it actually was my first time engaging with an attorney and I couldn't have asked for a better experience. I'd recommend this firm to anyone who's been injured seeking just and fair representation.

It is refreshing to see a true professional in the legal field who is compassionate, knowledgeable, and strategic. Justin advocates for his clients with the insight into what is truly in the client's best interest: whether that be entering into a favorable settlement or litigation. I would recommend Justin to clients seeking a tailored and white glove approach in personal injury cases!

We can’t rave ENOUGH about the law firm of Commins & Knudsen! They helped us on a case where the person whom we sold our house to tried to come back and sue us many years later for a number of petty grievances! All of his complaints and accusations were without merit, but because he was a lawyer, he thought he could intimidate us into paying him a wad of cash to go away. Immediately, we knew we needed help and so we went straight to Commins & Knudsen Law Firm.

For this case, we mainly worked with Mr. Commins and from our first phone call, we knew we were in good hands. The moment he started representing us we clearly understood how and why he has such a great reputation in representing big cases, going up against big, powerful corporate entities! Mr. Commins is very sharp, persistent, and as quietly fierce as they come when representing his clients. His amazing attention to details and skillful strategy of always keeping one step ahead of his opponent (like a good chess player) makes him an incredibly formidable lawyer. He works quickly and efficiently, so that when the opponent throws something our way, Mr. Commins is quick to respond by throwing two things back, thus not giving the opposition time to relax and contemplate their next step. We watched in amazement as we witnessed this rapid back and forth, until Mr. Commins beat back the bullying lawyer who tried to sue us ... and to our immense relief our attacker soon gave up!

We will always recommend Commins & Knudsen to anyone who is looking for representation. They are very professional and got us through our troubled times with speed & alacrity. We are so very grateful for their help, and giving us peace of mind in our time of immense worry and confusion. Mr. Commins, with his calm assured manner, got us through those turbulent times with just the right blend of vim and vigor. If they think they can help you, you cannot go wrong by having them represent you. We hope never to need their services again, but if we do, we will be making them our first call.

I had the pleasure of working with Justin Chou on my case, and I couldn't be happier with the outcome. His expertise, professionalism, and dedication were evident. Throughout the entire process, he kept me informed, answered all my questions, and provided valuable guidance every step of the way. Thanks to his strategic approach and thorough understanding of the law, we achieved a successful resolution. I highly recommend Justin to anyone in need of legal representation. Thank you for your outstanding service!

Attorney Justin Chou reviewed our accident injury case and provided prompt, thorough, and professional legal consultation.  He took the time to patiently explain the law and factors pertaining to our case.  He also returned our initial call outside of office hours, on a weekend while he was on a personal trip...now that's dedication!

Our company hired Commins and Knudsen (we worked directly with Kit Knudsen) as counsel in a difficult multi year trademark infringement case. What we love about Kit is that he is always level headed, he is extremely knowledgeable of the laws associated with trademark cases, and never makes promises in regards to cases that he can’t keep. This allowed us to make very measured and confident decisions as we fought our way through to a ruling that ultimately resulted in us prevailing. Commins and Knudsen is definitely a top notch firm and will be our go to moving forward if ever we need legal representation again.  We couldn’t recommend the firm more highly.

Commins and Knudsen delivers beyond your expectations!! Financial results are achieved through C & K's integrity, professionalism, and reputation with judges in courtrooms throughout the SF region.  They know the system(s) and subtle differences in the jurisdictions between each of the Bay Area nine counties---especially SF, Alameda, Marin and San Mateo counties.  This firm's unique skills allow your lawyers to  leverage  their collective expertise and knowledge into unequaled successes for their clients.  Their compensation is modest and based on you and your case.  At the end of my difficult case, Value is the best adjective for their fee.   Call David and Kit if you are in need of the best legal representation that exists in the BAY AREA

My firm Headwaters Holdings LLC has hired the Commins Knudsen team several times over the past twenty years for matters in the financial securities industry requiring seasoned legal expertise.  I’ve been impressed with responsiveness, hard work, fair and honest billing, but mostly with the quality of their legal work, which they are frequently commended for in court.
Jeff Goshay, Managing Member, Headwaters Holdings LLC

If you are looking at this review, you are likely in a stressful situation.  David is someone that you want on your team.  He is highly intelligent, experienced and thoughtful.  He treated me as a valued client and listened carefully to my story, asked good questions and was very pragmatic throughout the entire process.  His preparation and mastery of the law surrounding my case was fantastic and led to a great outcome.  Lastly his billing was reasonable, and I felt I received great value for the money we spent.  I am very grateful to David for all he did for me and our family, I cannot recommend him enough!!!

David Commins and his firm and associates were very helpful and good to work with in a complex contractual dispute. They were knowledgeable and did their research. The process was of necessity lengthy, worse with COVID court limitations, but they tried to keep their fees appropriate.

I was in a bad accident and was hospitalized for months. My recovery was long and painful. Justin Chou represented me as a personal injury lawyer. He was empathic and trustworthy, and a great listener. He made me feel supported every step of the way in the process. Justin provided honest, accurate, and understandable legal advice to all of my questions. I really appreciate how approachable and professional he has been at all times. He was diligent in gathering facts for the case and filing documents on time. I am grateful to have had such a strong advocate for me. I highly recommend Justin if you’re looking for a solid PI attorney.

We are deeply grateful for the services of David Commins and Justin Chou during a turbulent time in our lives. Their zen-like approach to our case helped keep us calm and focused, and ultimately helped us bring a very difficult period to a close. Highly recommend!

I  was referred to Justin Chou by a lawyer friend for a personal injury case involving negligent maintenance of government property. Justin was extremely knowledgeable about the many different considerations that were relevant for my case, and he clearly and compassionately explained these in detail to give me a good understanding of what to expect. He listened well and answered all my questions. In the end, Justin was not able to represent me, but based on my very positive experience consulting with him, without reservation, I would highly recommend him to others.

I had an amazing experience working with Hunter Pyle Law. From start to finish, the entire team was professional, responsive, and truly had my best interest in mind. Legal situations can be stressful, but they made the process much easier by keeping me informed every step of the way.

I had the privilege of being represented by Katie Fiester and couldn't have asked for better advocacy. She was fantastic throughout the entire process - always on top of the case, incredibly efficient, transparent, and genuinely supportive. Anytime I had a question or concern, she responded quickly and with patience. It really felt like she cared about getting the best possible outcome for me.

Thanks to their dedication and hard work, my case was resolved successfully. I'm very grateful for their help and would absolutely recommend the Hunter Pyle Law firm to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, responsive, and supportive legal team.

I reached out to Hunter Pyle Law on January 14th regarding concerns about a severance agreement with a January 27th signing deadline. Unfortunately, I did not receive a response until February 20th, nearly a month later and well after the deadline had already passed.

Because of the delay, I had already been forced to sign the agreement and no longer needed legal consultation by the time they responded.

I understand law firms can be busy, but when someone reaches out about a time-sensitive employment matter, responsiveness is critical. A reply nearly a month later makes it difficult to rely on the firm for urgent legal guidance.

Based on this experience, I would recommend looking elsewhere if your situation involves tight deadlines or time-sensitive employment issues.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Khiry,

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I apologize that we did not get back to you until more than a month after you contacted us. Our office was extremely busy in January and February 2026, but that is no excuse. We have made changes to our intake process to address this issue.

Again, my sincere apologies and I wish you all the best.

Hunter Pyle

reviews.text:
Should you ever have the need for an employment attorney, Tanya Tambling at Hunter Pyle Law is my recommendation.

From the time I made the initial call, the support staff was most helpful and I knew I was in good hands.

The support staff is very professional since they are the first to conduct an intake interview. Leticia is professional, asks very specific questions and is respectful of callers who don’t know where to turn.

I was injured at work and while on leave for the injury was terminated. A close friend suggested I contact a labor lawyer and mentioned the firm of Hunter Pyle. A few days later I was interviewing with Tanya Tambling. She asked questions in a non-threatening way. Later she informed me she felt my situation was one she would like to help me pursue.

From then till now, Tanya was right there guiding me through it all. If I had a question, or something happened, I would email or call Tanya and she was always available for me, never making me feel like I was intruding. Tanya helped make me feel confident we were a team and that what happened to me was not right. It was encouraging to know she understood my difficult situation.

Several months ago, with Tanya's guidance and encouragement, we were able to resolve my case.  It would not have happened had it not been for Tanya Tambling and her persistence.

Should you need legal representation for an employment related matter, look no further than the firm of Hunter Pyle and Ms Tanya Tambling."
Intake in the phone with the lady was not a very pleasant or helpful conversation especially during a stressful and confusing time. I decided to look elsewhere for assistance.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Exceptional Employment Law Representation — Hunter Pyle Law

I had the privilege of being represented by Hunter Pyle Law and Valerian Law in my class action case, involving lost wages, and meal and rest break violations. From day one, both firms stood firmly by my side and made what could have been a stressful process feel manageable and fair.

Hunter Pyle, Katie Fiester, Xinying Valerian, and Dan Gildor were outstanding. They were always available, responded promptly to every question, and consistently kept me updated on the progress of my case. During my deposition, when facing the hospital’s opposing counsel, I felt completely supported — they gave me confidence and stood strong on my behalf.

Throughout the entire process, I felt like I was part of a team rather than just a client. They treated me with respect, communicated clearly, and fought hard while maintaining absolute integrity. Their knowledge of employment law is unmatched, and their approach is both compassionate and strategic.

I was introduced to Hunter Pyle Law through Valerian Law, and I’m so grateful for that connection. Both firms streamlined the process, fought for justice, and truly cared about my well-being. I would absolutely work with them again and recommend them without hesitation to anyone facing workplace issues.

If you’re looking for honest, responsive, and deeply knowledgeable advocates who fight for what’s right — look no further than Hunter Pyle Law.

I don’t write many reviews, but Hunter Pyle Law absolutely deserves this.
I worked with Hunter Pyle Law as the class representative in a class action case, let me tell you, these guys are experts in worker’s rights and I couldn’t have asked for a better team. From day one, Jake and Hunter Pyle treated me with respect, took time to really understand the facts, and—most importantly—explained the process in plain English. No jargon, no rushing me off the phone. They were consistently professional and patient, and they laid out what to expect at each stage so there were no surprises. What stood out most was the communication. Jake checked in regularly, answered my questions (even the anxious ones), and made sure I felt prepared for every step. I always felt heard and supported. Most importantly, they got us the settlement amount we deserved. I can’t recommend them enough!

Katie and Hunter were a pleasure to work with. They really do fight for their clients. They care and are patient. It was a blessing to work with them. They are very knowledgeable about the legal process. I was updated on my case often and every step of the way. I would use them again if I ever needed to.

I had a really positive experience with Hunter Law Firm. Hunter himself was who I communicated with after a few months and he helped me reach a settlement with a former employer, and I’m very satisfied with how everything was handled. From the beginning, they were professional, supportive, and made sure I understood every part of the process. Communication was great, they were always quick to respond to my questions and kept me updated every step of the way. I felt like they genuinely cared about my case and were working hard to get the best result for me.
Thanks to their help, the case was resolved successfully. If I ever need legal help again, I will definitely reach out to them. I highly recommend Hunter Law Firm to anyone looking for reliable and effective legal support.

Hunter's firm has been super helpful to me and several of my referrals over several years. We met at Berkeley Law in the 1990's and he has been committed to employee rights no matter what. You can rely on Hunter and his team if you or a friend are in a sticky  situation

Hunter Pyle Law was highly recommended by a very close family friend. I can say enough how grateful I was to have Tanya Tambling as my attorney in a slip and fall incident. Her experience, guidence and compassion for her clients is evident, not to mention her honesty. Right off the back she explained throughly how slip and fall cases could be difficult but was willing to move forward and represent me without hesitation.

Just a little over a year my case was settled and through out this whole process Tanya never failed to keep the lines of communication open. Her paralegals Kim and Darlene were also a pleasure to work with. They both were so sweet and understanding.

I truly and sincerly recommend Tanya Tambling. I can't tell you enough how much I so appreciate how she handled my case. Thank you Hunter Pyle Law for your awesome team.

Again, thank you Tanya for everything. You truly blessed me more than you know.

reviews.ownerResponse: Jordan, thank you for reaching out to our firm. Our office manager emailed you to set up a time to do an intake but we did not hear back from you. We obviously cannot make a decision about your case without speaking with you. If you are still interested in doing an intake, please contact us at your earliest convenience. We can be reached at (510) 444-4400. If not, we wish you all the best.

reviews.text: Hunter Pyle Law represented me in a wage and hour case against my former employer. They fought hard for me and were able to recover everything that I was owed plus attorneys fees. I felt like Mr. Hunter had my back the entire case and always responded to my calls and texts, even on nights and weekends! Solid law firm for sure. If you want real warriors, you should hire them!

Hunter Pyle has been an invaluable resource on numerous occasions when I've needed legal advice. He and his team offer not only expert guidance but also a supportive and compassionate approach. I highly recommend Hunter and his firm for any employment-related legal matters. It's truly reassuring to have someone in your corner during times when legal expertise is crucial.

AMAZING IN EVERY POSSIBLE WAY!

I've been using the professional services of Hunter Pyle Law Offices and it is very vital to share the amazing experience I had.

I strongly recommend Hunter Pyle law Offices for your legal needs.

From the very first call I made I had the best experience speaking to a very nice and caring lady, unfortunately I cannot recall her name. She listened to everything I said and showed genuine care, from there I was connected with Jake Darin, and I would like to say that I was beyond lucky to deal with Mr. Darin, he had showed care, understanding, not to mention the knowledge and exemplary work ethics. There has not been one time that Mr. Darin was late to respond in answering every question and explaining in details each process and every terminology. With Mr. Darin, it was never about the business only, it was always about me as a human first and as a client second.
Mr. Darin is an asset to this amazing firm as well as to any other firm that he may work with.
I strongly recommend Mr. Darin for his unique excellent work ethics and the passion that he has in what he does the best, which is helping people!

Needless to say working with Mr. Darin was the path to a great success at this firm.

Hunter Pyle law Offices is your way to fight against the unjust.

Hunter and his team represented me and other drivers in a lawsuit that settled for more than 7 million dollars. Hunter did a great job handling some very tricky dynamics in the case. I would definitely use him again if I felt like I was having problems at work.

In addition to being great lawyers, Hunter and his team listened to my questions and responded with clear and honest answers. They communicated with me at all times and applied their expertise in a way that was really impressive. They were able to find several areas where my former company had failed in their duties as an employer and used them to get an incredible settlement.

Thank you Hunter and Team!!!

I can't say enough good things about my experience working with Hunter Pyle Law. From the moment I reached out about my workplace accommodation issues, Hunter was professional and incredibly knowledgeable. Before hiring him, I spent months trying to resolve the situation on my own, dealing with an unresponsive HR department that continually avoided addressing my concerns. But as soon as Hunter stepped in, everything changed dramatically. Within weeks, he handled all communication with my employer expertly, which took a massive weight off my shoulders, and achieved results I couldn't get on my own.

Hunter's expertise in employment law and attention to detail were evident every step of the way. He kept me informed about every development, explained everything clearly, and made me feel confident that I was in good hands. His strategic approach made all the difference - thanks to his efforts, my employer finally made all the necessary changes and resolved the situation completely.

I would highly recommend Hunter to anyone dealing with workplace issues who needs strong, effective representation. When regular channels through HR and management prove ineffective, Hunter Pyle is the attorney you want on your side. His strategic approach and deep knowledge of employment law consistently deliver results for his clients.

I highly recommend Tanya at Hunter Pyle Law! She is amazing to work with. Throughout the stressful recovery process from my accident, Tanya and her team handled all the details behind the scenes, making everything so much easier. I can't recommend her enough!

I had the distinct pleasure of working with Jake Darin and the incredible team at Hunter Pyle over the past few months, and I truly can’t sing their praises enough. As someone navigating the legal world for the first time, I was unsure of my options and overwhelmed by the complexities. But from day one, Jake and his team were not only incredibly knowledgeable, but also deeply attentive and communicative. Jake walked me through every step, demystified the entire process, and empowered me to make the best decisions… Ultimately leading to a settlement that exceeded my expectations. I now have complete trust in Jake and the firm, and it’s a huge relief knowing I have them in my corner if I ever need legal counsel again. A heartfelt thanks to everyone at Hunter Pyle!

I can’t say enough about their professional and wonderful services! I’m lucky to find Tanya as our lawyer to represent my family member in an employment case. With her knowledge, patient and intelligent, she was able to get a very good settlement for us! I’m so happy and greatly appreciated what she did. I highly recommend her to anyone who is looking for a good lawyer to represent them.
Stayed in contact with my whole team. Responded to our questions even if we messaged or called after hours. They can definitely get the job done!

I worked with attorney Bradan Litzinger and he was able to help me resolve my case with my previous employer with a great outcome. He has great attention to detail, timely communication and showed much dedication. Overall amazing firm, wonderful to work with.
A dedicated and hard working firm, real personable. I hope I don't have need for them again but if you do I would highly recommend this firm

I have known Hunter Pyle for over two decades, have referred many people to him, including my own clients, and have consulted with him directly, and have always known him to provide thoughtful advice and effective representation.

I had the best experience with this law firm! My Attorney, Tanya Tambling is an intelligent and well informed professional. I could not be happier with the outcome of my disability discrimination,  retaliation, race discrimination,  and misclassification claim involving my former employer. Her calm and empathetic demeanor is so reassuring. Tanya definitely has my recommendation without reservation, as her expertise in representing employees outshines all others. Thank you, Tanya!

I had the pleasure of receiving counsel from Hunter Pyle and working with his his staff over the last few months, and I can't recommend them enough. As someone who had never received legal counsel in the past, I was very unknowledgeable about the process and lacked clarity about my options. A friend recommended him to me, and I couldn't be more thankful. Throughout the process, there was a deep sense of consideration and communication from Hunter and his staff. Ultimately, he helped clear my path to take the best actions and decisions for my situation. I deeply trust his firm and I feel secure knowing that they are there to help me if I need their services in the future.
1000% recommend this Law Firm ❤️
The staff was very attentive and explained everything in detail. Any questions I had were answered. Thank you.

Hunter and his firm are by far the most professional firm that I have encountered. He was very diligent with all of his work that he did for me. He always responded within a timely manner and was sure to keep me in the loop every step of the way. I can honestly say he treated my case as if it were his own. I will continue to recommend him to anyone I know that is facing any legal issues with their employer. Thank you again Hunter for all of your work!
Jake & Hunter went above and beyond to help me through a challenging process. Highly recommend!
Hunter Pyle is one few attorneys in my experience who actually listens and validates while giving helpful feedback. Thank you for balancing kindness with professionalism!
Never calls people back who aren't important to him.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry that you did not receive a call back. We make every effort to return all calls within 24 hours, and I was not aware that there were any calls that had not been returned. Please call me at 510.444.4400 so that we can set up a time to talk.

reviews.text: I had an amazing experience with Hunter Pyle representing me in a particularly thorny and difficult situation with an ex employer. I can't recommend them enough.

Hunter and Drea have been awesome! We've been working together for years and I cannot recommend this Law Firm enough. I do not know a lot about the inner workings of the American legal system but Hunter and Drea were there to talk me through each step of the process. If you or someone you know needs help with your job or even if you just have questions call Hunter Pyle Law.

Everyone who works here is super nice and will do the best they can to help. It's inspiring how dedicated the team is. Hunter Pyle Law fights for your rights as a worker and does not give up.

What are you doing? Call them right now before you forget!

Please consider this Law firm they won't let you down they are amazing!!.. Hunter Pyle Law firm...

I just want to say thank you so much to Hunter and his Team for a job well done. They've helped us tremendously with our meal breaks and background checks for over ten years. We are grateful for all the hard work... Thanks again you all are awesome.

I cannot recommend the attorneys at Hunter Pyle highly enough. I had the pleasure of working with Tanya and Drea through a very difficult case. Fom the initial intake phone call to final settlement, they made me feel heard and supported and like someone was on my side.  They guided me through the process with expertise and kindness. You can tell they are passionate about their work and they do it well.

Hunter Pyle Law,

I would like to take this opportunity to express my sincere appreciation for the exceptional legal services that attorney, Andrea Nunez provided recently on my behalf. Drea's legal expertise and professionalism went above and beyond my expectations throughout the course of my case.  Drea's prompt responses and attention to detail really meant a lot to me.  I always felt that my legal rights were being protected and felt very comfortable as she navigated the legal system on my behalf.

I am very grateful to have had Drea as my legal counsel and for her passion, dedication and professionalism that deserves recognition.  Thanks again to the entire Hunter Pyle Law team for their legal advice, time, and efforts.

I would recommend Hunter Pyle Law without reservation to anyone in need of professional legal services.

Never received a call back but after my review Mr Pyle  introduce me to Nick and scheduled me for a intake on march 13, 2023, Nick was patient.
