reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Mckoy, our firm keeps careful records of all contacts and we have no record of you ever having contacted us. Please call us at your earliest convenience at (510) 444-4400 so that we can process your intake. We look forward to hearing from you.

reviews.text: We are so grateful for the countless hours and all the hard work that each of you put in over the last year in order to vindicate your client. Thanks to all of you.what an amazing team.  Hunter law firm is absolutely fantastic team to work with

Hunter Pyle represented me in connection with a class-action suit for unlawful break policies that was successfully won. Hunter is an excellent communicator who can explain even the most complicated issues in lay terms.

He offers practical advice and has been generous as a sounding board with advice and guidance over the years. I definitely recommend Hunter Pyle to anyone who seeks a true professional.

I contacted Hunter Pyle Law to help me review the terms and conditions of a severance agreement.  Mr. Pyle is an excellent attorney.  He listened to my concerns, offered several options, and helped me understand the terms and conditions of the agreement.  I have over 40 years of business experience, and have worked with many attorneys over the years.  Mr. Pyle is one of the best, and a really great guy.  I would highly recommend Hunter Pyle Law for any issues related to employment law.

Hunter Pyle and his team at Hunter Pyle Law are outstanding and I can highly recommend them should you need legal counsel related to challenges you may be facing in your workplace.  I have sought Hunter’s counsel twice over the last several years and have been thoroughly impressed by Hunter's knowledge, professionalism, responsiveness, kindness, and empathy.  I appreciated his level-headed assessment and pragmatic recommendations on how to best handle the situations I was facing, and appreciated the fact that he didn’t sugar-coat, or over-promise given the realities of employment law in California.  While I hope to never have to seek counsel again during my career, having established a relationship with Hunter and his firm and knowing they will be there for me should I need them is reassuring.  Several friends have also sought counsel from Hunter Pyle Law, and their experiences were similarly outstanding.  Again, I highly recommend Hunter Pyle and his team, and will continue to refer family and friends to his practice without hesitation.
I definitely recommend this Law firm. Tanya was a pleasure to work with, she is very attentive and responds in a timely manner. Thank you so much for your services, I greatly appreciate it.

Highly recommend Hunter Pyle Law to anyone in the Bay and surrounding areas.  This was the first and only time I’ve needed a lawyer and Hunter’s team kept me informed and prepared for every step along the process.  I was impressed by their professionalism and determination to help me.

Not a good idea to do an intake with this firm. The intake coordinator calls you from his personal cell phone and uses his own words to produce an intake then Hunter the attorney reviews your private information and doesn’t give you any supportive advice. It appears to be a cookie cutter law firm and they can’t take cases that really need an experience attorney to fight for you. I regret sharing my intake information my case was denied representation and I never got to speak to a law professional.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Valdovinos, the attorneys carefully reviewed your intake and determined that we were unable to assist you. Contrary to being a "cookie cutter law firm," we are highly experienced in employment law (25 years of fighting for employees and workers rights) as our website indicates. We are also careful with all information provided during intakes and ensure that such information is kept completely confidential. Please feel free to reach back out to us at (510) 444-4400 if you have any further questions.

reviews.text:
Hunter & Team represent the best quality legal representation I have retained in my life - spanning employment, insurance, trust/probate, financial, disability, and personal injury, just to name from memory.

While I had read of Hunter's extensive experience, thoughtful expertise, impeccable qualifications, and impressive results in my search for a top plaintiff's employment attorney, after our very first meeting, I knew he and his firm were the perfect fit for me and my needs - and Hunter made sure I knew it was mutual!

While I had already obtained a retainer from a top 5 employment lawyer in California, it was Hunter's eagerness to "fight for the little guy," and specifically, me, that sold me.

Despite holes in my case, Hunter took my case enthusiastically on the spot and always stayed sure to proactively keep me apprised - often compassionately inquiring into my overall well-being and expressing his sincere hopes for my future.

After only working for my former employer for exactly just one week, Hunter's no-nonsense negotiations and willingness to "get his hands dirty" with "real work" generated me a successful settlement of over $100,000!

Hunter has even helped me, since - free of charge - in areas outside his specialty.

THANK YOU, HUNTER & TEAM!!

Hunter helped us by giving us excellent advice regarding important questions we had about a severance agreement my husband was getting ready to sign. He was professional, honest, and to the point. His wisdom was invaluable and he was truly watching out for our best interest. We are so grateful for having been referred to him by a friend and in turn would highly recommend him to others!

As this was my first experience with initiating a legal claim, the process of finding a firm to represent me was overwhelming, daunting and stressful.  From my very first contact with Leticia for an intake call to closing my case with Jake Darin, my experience has been nothing but outstanding.  The professionalism and compassion displayed by this firm and its associates reassured me that I was in good hands.

After my initial meeting with Hunter and going over the details of my case, I left that call feeling that he truly cared about my situation and had my best interest in mind.  I had the pleasure of speaking with Hunter on several occasions but I mainly worked with Jake Darin.

From the start, Jake was professional, compassionate, clear, timely and very organized.  But more importantly, he was patient, listened, and answered all of my concerns while leading me through all the necessary steps as I had never done this before.  You can feel Jake truly cares about his clients and you can trust him to lead you to the solution that is best for you.  I highly recommend Jake Darin and Hunter Pyle’s law firm to represent you.

I was rear ended at a red light July 2018 by a Ford F550.  A friend referred me to Tanya Tambling.  After our initial meeting to discuss the case, I was convinced she was the right attorney to represent me.  I found Ms. Tambling attentive, patient, thorough, tough, brilliant, calm, communicative, and thoughtful throughout the more than two years We worked together.  And, I stress the TOGETHER part.  We were a team.

Every step of the way throughout the litigation process she took time to explain everything from the interrogatories to deposition to mediations.  She gave me instructions and a checklist of medical professionals to see.  She walked me through the ENTIRE litigation process to minimize my stress level.  She had a clear understanding of my injuries and treatments and accompanied me to my examinations for opposing counsel.  Any time a decision needed to be made Ms. Tambling immediately contacted me to discuss the issue and explain her rationale.  She communicated via phone, text, and email.  Never did I contact her and she did not respond, NEVER.  Our conversations always ended on a positive note.  Not one disagreement.

Her thoughtfulness, respectfulness, expertise, and professionalism made me feel my case mattered, that I mattered.  Her decisions kept my best interests and well being the focus in the case.  She’s conscientious, pleasant, and easy going, which is refreshing and calming.  That allowed us to build a rapport that took her from being my attorney to my friend.

Ms. Tambling is amazing!  She is excellent at what she does.  It was my good fortune to be referred to her.  She fought  to get the best settlement for me and never slacked off.  Her perseverance paid off for me and HunterPyle Law.

I would recommend  HUNTERPYLE Law, and especially Tanya Tambling (partner), to any family member or friend who needs a personal injury attorney or for any types of legal cases they’ll represent.
Ms. Gail is such a great attorney. She worked on my wifes SSI disability case that kept getting denied. Very caring and professional at what she does!
Great law office
Nabiel was exceptionally kind and straight forward and he did not waste time with my case. If it wasn’t for him I don’t know where I would be today.
Great lawyer really helped me out and kept me updated on The Whole time
Good job

I’ve been under a lot of stress dealing with my current DUI case, and having Nabiel  represent me has truly made a huge difference and given me piece of mind. Even with my case still pending, I can say from the bottom of my heart that he has been dependable, responsive, and supportive during this stressful time. This is the second time working with him, he helped get my first DUI dismissed, and now with my second case, he continues to fight for me with the same dedication. When i first  met him in person he was not only professional but also had a good sence of humor which made me feel more comfortable and not intimidated.
What I appreciate most is that he is always ahead of the game. He tells me exactly what steps to take, what will help me get better results, and how to prepare before anything even happens. That guidance has helped me feel more in control during a very overwhelming time.
He answers everytime i call him and if he's busy in court he still answers but makes sure to return my call, he also makes sure to explain things in a way that i can understand, and never makes me feel judged or alone. He even drove from the Bay Area to Fresno to be there for my hearing, which showed how seriously he takes his clients and their situations. If you ever face yourself getting a DUI I highly recommend attorney Nabiel Ahmed.
I’m very thankful to have him as my attorney.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello “Mona.” I am sorry you feel the way you do. Our call was recorded and notes were taken by AI which don't reflect the views you expressed in your review.

Please find the AI Recap of our conversation below: The conversation focused on Rizeq Ali seeking legal assistance for their son, who has a complicated criminal case and mental health issues. Nabiel Ahmed agreed to follow up with Rizeq Ali later that day.
Recap
Rizeq Ali is looking for a lawyer for their son, who has multiple criminal cases and mental health issues, and is currently not attending court due to fear and past experiences in jail.
Rizeq Ali previously hired a lawyer, J. Jeff Hayden, for $7,000, but the court required their son to appear in person, which caused additional anxiety for him.
Rizeq Ali expressed concern that their son's previous strike could lead to harsher penalties if he returns to court.
Nabiel Ahmed requested Rizeq Ali's name and phone number to facilitate further communication regarding the legal assistance needed.
Tasks
Nabiel Ahmed will call Rizeq Ali back later today to discuss the legal situation further.

Attorney Ahmed Calls Rizeq Ali Back:
The conversation involved a discussion about a legal case concerning a son with multiple charges, including kidnapping for robbery and drug-related offenses. The speaker sought legal representation and discussed retainer fees with the attorney, Nabiel Ahmed.
Recap
The speaker explained that their son has multiple charges out of San Mateo County, including robbery and drug offenses, and mentioned that he has a warrant for his arrest due to not returning to court after being bailed out.
The attorney, Nabiel Ahmed, indicated that based on the complexity of the case, including prior strikes and multiple charges, a retainer fee of at least $50,000 would be required for legal representation.
The speaker expressed concern about the potential for their son to receive a lengthy prison sentence and questioned the value of the retainer fee in relation to the outcome of the case.
Nabiel Ahmed clarified that he cannot guarantee any specific outcomes in legal cases and offered a consultation for $1,500 to review the son's case further, which the speaker considered.
Tasks
The speaker will provide the attorney with their son's case number for further review.
The attorney will conduct a consultation to assess the case for a fee of $1,500.

Andy and Kristin are pure godsends. My brother and his friends experienced a tragic car accident where they were hit head on and that took the life of one of the boys. When we contacted Andy and his team, they explained our options and committed to helping the boys bring some light out of a dark situation. When I say Kristin and Andy went above and beyond for us I could not overstate that. They worked so hard for the boys for 2 years to bring the best settlement possible. They looked at every option, asked every question, explained every situation and were so diligent and patient. They were always on our side and were such incredible advocates for the boys.
We are so so grateful, while the accident will always be a painful memory, Kristin and Andy were able to bring some good out of it.
I could not recommend them enough, you can 100% trust they will show up for you. We will forever we be grateful. Thank you Kristin and Andy!

Jim and Andy and Cheryl, and we are sure many others in the office, have been a great help and extremely professional in handling my wife's case. Through challenging times right after the accident and up to the day of settlement all  correspondence was followed up with calls - excellent service. A potential troublesome part of this terrible event was made seamlessly simple. Thank you very much GJEL!

From the initial consultation, GJEL demonstrated a deep understanding of my case and the complexities involved. They took the time to listen to my story, answer all of my questions, and outline a clear and comprehensive strategy for my personal injury case. Their transparency and commitment to keeping me informed throughout the entire process gave me peace of mind during a challenging time in my life.

I am pleased to briefly outline my experience with GJEL attorneys. Mr. Andy Gillin handled my case. I selected Mr. Gillin because of the exceptional reputation enjoyed by him and his firm. Mr. Gillin has been been very successful in representing clients over many many years. In the scheme of things, my case was relatively minor; however, Mr.Gillin accepted my case, clearly outlined the expected legal process and mapped out his strategy. Moreover, Mr. Gillin clearly explained what he needed me to provide in the way of background and facts relevant to my accident. Mr. Gillin was very calm, precise, and confident. He advised me to relax and simply send him any documentation, such as letters from the other party's insurance company, police reports, doctor's evaluation, etc. as I received them. Updates along the way were greatly appreciated.

Once Mr. Gillin engaged with the other party's insurance company, I could tell his "negotiating style" was professional and respectful....all the while seeking a reasonable settlement on my behalf. Mr. Gillin was quite confident my case could be settled without a lawsuit and I was pleased to hear that. Happily, an agreement was reached and it seemed like a "win-win" situation to me. I am extremely satisfied by the outcome.

As an aside, the paralegal and other law firm staff working with Mr. Gillin were extremely competent. All correspondence back and forth was timely and exceeded all expectations.

Bottom line, Mr. Gillin and his team are true professionals.

Bill C....Lafayette

We were referred to the GJEL firm and they came highly recommended. After being in a traumatic accident, their kindness and professionalism put us at ease from the very beginning of a 3-year journey. Everyone involved in the process from the investigators, the paralegals, expert witnesses, and mediator did a tremendous job of keeping us informed. Going up against a government entity, we quickly found out, was not an easy task, but this firm handled our case when many would have shied away from it. We will be forever grateful to Jim Larsen for making us feel like a longtime friend who always had our best interests in mind. This is who you want on your side!
They called me too late to help me, but they were polite and professional.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Your feedback is greatly appreciated, as it helps us identify areas where we can improve. We are taking immediate steps to ensure our response times are quicker in the future, as we understand the importance of timely communication, especially in situations like yours.

Despite the unfortunate circumstances, we are pleased to hear that our team was polite and professional. We pride ourselves on our professional approach, and we are glad that it was apparent in our interactions with you.

We hope to have the opportunity to assist you in the future, should you ever need our services again. We assure you of our commitment to providing prompt and efficient service at all times.

Thank you once again for your understanding and feedback.

reviews.text: Andy Gillin is the most knowledgeable, professional, hard working, honorable and compassionate attorney in the Bay Area. Andy’s office and incredible staff has handled three of my automobile accident claims over a span of 20 years, the most recent was a traumatic car accident on the Bay Bridge in February 2022. I am pleased to briefly outline my experience with GJEL attorneys. Mr. Andy Gillin handled my case. I selected Mr. Gillin because of the exceptional reputation enjoyed by him and his firm. Mr. Gillin has been been very successful in representing clients over many many years. In the scheme of things, my case was relatively minor; however, Mr.Gillin accepted my case, clearly outlined the expected legal process and mapped out his strategy. Moreover, Mr. Gillin clearly explained what he needed me to provide in the way of background and facts relevant to my accident. Mr. Gillin was very calm, precise, and confident. He advised me to relax and simply send him any documentation, such as letters from the other party's insurance company, police reports, doctor's evaluation, etc. as I received them. Updates along the way were greatly appreciated.

Once Mr. Gillin engaged with the other party's insurance company, I could tell his "negotiating style" was professional and respectful....all the while seeking a reasonable settlement on my behalf. Mr. Gillin was quite confident my case could be settled without a lawsuit and I was pleased to hear that. Happily, an agreement was reached and it seemed like a "win-win" situation to me. I am extremely satisfied by the outcome.

As an aside, the paralegal and other law firm staff working with Mr. Gillin were extremely competent. All correspondence back and forth was timely and exceeded all expectations.

Bottom line, Mr. Gillin and his team are true professionals.

Bill C....Lafayette

reviews.text: I can’t thank Richard and Eric enough for their hard work on my Social Security disability case. It has been a long haul over several years but they have made sure that I knew everything that was happening and I was fully informed. They are professional, trustworthy and experienced attorneys and they go all in for their clients!  If you need any kind of help at all with Social Security Disability you could not go to a better Firm.  I knew I was in the best hands and I couldn’t be happier.  Thank you so much!

I can't thank Mr Gutstsdt and Erik enough for all of their help with my Social Security Disability claim. They were honest about my chances and helped me throughout the process, which ended up at trial. We won & I can't thank them enough. I recommend them whenever I have the opportunity to.

I was previously working with another attorney who said on his commercial he works with you directly. Not only did I never even talk to him until I fired him,  but SSA didn't end up with 1/2 of the documents I submitted. It made sense why I was denied twice.

They came highly recommended to me and I wouldn't hesitate in calling them. You will not regret it!

It was clear to us that our beloved relative could no longer work. But government roadblocks thwarted our every move.  We then contacted Mr. Gutstadt. His team provided the shining light, and navigated us thru a very troubling time with expertise and compassion.  I highly recommend this law firm and Mr. Gutstadt.

I contacted Richard over 2 years ago after being denied my Disability benefits the first time. He and his partner, Eric, are extremely well-versed in SSDI law, processes & the court system. Additionally, they understand the human side of managing disability’s and really care about their clients welfare. They are compassionate but straight forward and honest with clients — a trait hard to find. Working with them at a distance during Covid lockdown was smooth & they were easily accessible anytime I needed them. We went through two rounds of filings with SSDI before I was approved in Dec 2021.  And even after I was approved there is still wrap-up work and guidance they are providing. I could not have been successful without Richard & Eric’s legal representation & guidance! I am thankful every day.
I spoke with Richard and he was so compassionate. He spent a lot of time on the phone with me, explaining the process and at what point his firm would be able to help me.
Richard, Eric and Brenda took excellent care of me and won my case !!!! God Bless

I am beyond happy to share that even after hearing how difficult my case might be to prove, he was never discouraged and took my case. Long story short, we won!!!!!! I am forever grateful to everyone who worked on my case and wish continued success for this office! Need I mention, the great communication I’ve had also! This was important to me as I have trust issues and anxiety!
The Lawyers are rude and condescending.

I had a great experience with this firm. They responded to my emails and calls very promptly every time, they explained the whole process very clearly. I had no idea what to expect going into this and they made it very very easy to understand the process. They are also very nice and easy to talk to. I  highly highly recommend them.

I can't say enough about this Law Firm! Once they took my case, they fought for me like they were fighting for themselves.  Once my second appeal was denied, I  knew it was time to get a lawyer. I looked online and read about Gustadt Law Firm and that they ONLY handle disability cases. When I called to make the appointment, the voice on the other end was very kind and professional.  I knew that I had picked the right place for representation.  I met with Eric Patrick first.  We talked and exchanged information for about an hour. When I left that meeting, if I could have, I would have run down the street, jump in the air, and kicked my heels together with excitment!  But instead, I  slowly walked to my car with the confidence that they would represent me with quality and knowledge possessed to fight this kind of case and actually listen to my concerns. He was thorough in answering any questions I had, ALWAYS returned my calls and emails promptly and would contact me with updates as soon as he received them. After I won my case, I met Richard Gustadt, who was just as kind, professional, and knowledgeable. He explained the finacial portion of my case and how things should go.  When they received the check from SSI for their fees, they both called me together, to check on me and let me know that payment  for their services had been received.  I give them 5 stars and will reccomed them to anyone fighting their 2nd disability appeal!

Thank you Richard and Eric, you are the Best!

Kim Benford

I used the services of Richard and his partner Eric to fight my SSDI claim that was repeatedly denied.  My claim got to the point where I had to fight it in court and that is when I contacted this office. We met for an initial visit where they discuss your background and whether you have a case or not. Thankfully I did and they started working on my case right away.  They handled all the medical records and paperwork history from the SS office. After personally fighting for just about a year, I was able to sit aside while they fought for me.  I always felt comfortable with them and if I ever had any questions I could contact them anytime.  Prior to court we discussed what would happen and who the judge would be.  Fortunately they have been in the business long enough to be familiar with the judges in the area and visa versa. I was incredibly nervous during court but Eric kept me on track. In the end we won!  Even after the trial they don't stop working for you.  Richard will review the finances that SS should be paying monthly to see if it is correct or not.  Mine was not and he fought for me to fix it.
Bottom line, these guys are professional, knowledgeable, friendly and you can't ask for a better team to fight your SSDI case. I am forever indebted to these guys.

Gustadt, instead of turning me away since the case was coming up shortly in front of the Judge, the office embraced my case and represented me in a short period of time with SUCCESSFUL results! I am VERY GRATEFUL for their knowledge of the law surrounding SSDI, expertise and warm and friendly communication before and after my case in answering ALL my questions without hesitation and in a timely manner!

Thank you Richard, Eric and Staff! YOUR TEAM MADE THE DIFFERENCE!

reviews.text:
I recently had the opportunity to work with Morris Law Firm regarding a criminal defense case, and I cannot express how grateful I am for their expertise and dedication. From the initial consultation to the resolution of my case, the team at Morris Law Firm demonstrated professionalism, compassion, and an unwavering commitment to achieving the best possible outcome.

**Expertise and Knowledge:**
The attorneys at Morris Law Firm possess a deep understanding of criminal law and the intricacies of the legal system. They took the time to explain every aspect of my case in detail, ensuring that I was informed and comfortable with the proceedings. Their knowledge of local laws and court procedures was evident, which gave me confidence in their ability to navigate my case effectively.

**Personalized Approach:**
One of the standout features of my experience with Morris Law Firm was their personalized approach. They took the time to understand my unique situation and concerns, tailoring their strategy to fit my needs. I never felt like just another client; they were genuinely invested in my case and took the time to listen to my thoughts and questions.

**Communication:**
Throughout the entire process, communication was excellent. The team kept me updated on the progress of my case and was always available to answer any questions I had. I appreciated their prompt responses and the transparency they maintained, which alleviated much of the stress associated with a criminal case.

**Results-Oriented Strategy:**
Morris Law Firm is results-oriented, and their strategic approach to my defense was impressive. They worked tirelessly to build a strong case, utilizing their extensive resources and network of experts to support my defense. Their efforts ultimately led to a favorable resolution, which I believe would not have been possible without their hard work and dedication.

**Compassionate Support:**
Dealing with a criminal case can be an incredibly stressful experience, but the team at Morris Law Firm provided compassionate support every step of the way. They understood the emotional toll it took on me and my family, and their empathetic approach made a significant difference in how I coped with the situation.

**Conclusion:**
In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Morris Law Firm for anyone in need of criminal defense representation. Their combination of expertise, personalized service, excellent communication, and results-driven approach sets them apart in the legal field. If you find yourself in a challenging legal situation, you can trust that Morris Law Firm will fight for you with integrity and dedication. Thank you, Morris Law Firm, for your unwavering support and for helping me through this difficult time!

reviews.text: Please be cautious before retaining this firm. On Day 1 of the consult the lead attorney and support staff are experts at putting you at ease, but on the back end there is no support and little communication unless you engage first. In my situation I was lead to believe lead attorney Dadlani (Seth) Morris would handle my case from start to finish and that was not the case at all. Unfortunately I just went off the google profile and felt comfortable at the initial consultation where I was mislead. This was a lesson learned I would strongly recommend not retaining this office.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ramin - I have reached out to you several times to address the root of the issue. I am the Managing Attorney and take my responsibility to oversee all cases at the firm very seriously. As we discussed, I personally handled every aspect of your case from beginning to end. Our firm handled five court appearances, several in-person meetings, over a dozen phone calls, text messages, and emails - all of which we were happy to do as it was part of our approach to flat fee services. It was important to me to keep you informed throughout the process and always be available to answer your questions. When you contacted me about a separate civil matter on the weekend, I was happy to guide you through it and make phone calls on your behalf even though it was a matter I did not represent you on.

I do agree with you, Ramin, that there was an issue with our working relationship. I believe this surfaced over a year into our representation. We had a frank conversation about your case, and after that, you decided to post this review, fire us, and hire a different lawyer (I believe this is your third lawyer). It’s disappointing that you would post a misleading review rather than coming to me directly, but at this point I only wish you the best. If you would like to contact me to resolve the ill feelings and move forward, I remain open to a conversation.

My team and I work hard and around the clock to fight for what we believe in, and we pour all of ourselves into it. I remain proud of Morris Law for providing hundreds of clients and their families with attention and care while being given the honor of handling their cases.
Nothing makes us happier than getting a client through a difficult situation. Thanks for the kind words Terence!

reviews.text: The Morris Law Firm and especially Seth Morris made me feel safe and secure in such a difficult time in our lives.  I will never forget how kind everyone was in such a life-altering situation.  Very professional and someone who knows the law.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Danielle – I’m glad to hear everything is going great

reviews.text: I am very pleased with my experience working with the whole team at Aharoni Business Law.  After engaging the firm for the purpose of bringing on a new partner, they were quickly able to discern and draft the documents I needed. I can undoubtedly say that their work is thorough and that Jackie is tremendously responsive to questions and concerns. I've had previous experiences with other attorneys during which I've been met with either incompetence or condescension. With Jackie though, I felt that she listened and took the time to truly dissect the complexity of our legal situation(s). Her desire to help me further my own business goals and build a long-standing relationship with me (and my business), left me feeling beyond thrilled with her work. I would (and do) recommend Aharoni Business Law to all of my peers!
The attorney that I worked with was incredibly helpful and generous. She was actually invested in the work that I am trying to do in my business.
I used Aharoni Business Law to open my LLC this year.  Highly Recommend.
I've met with Jacqueline Tate-Naghi and was really impressed. She made me feel very comfortable and confident in her expertise. I'll be using Aharoni Business Law for my future legal needs.

15 years ago my dad was opening a defective can and it cut open his hand leaving him with nerve damage. 4 attorneys told him he had no case, one said he might get 20k and Mr. Cohen ended up representing him with a 130k settlement.

When I recently got into a disagreement with our trust, he was the absolute most competent by far out of the 4 attorneys I spoke with. Very honest, thoughtful, and generous. Highly recommend to anyone with a complex case.
Love this man he heard my issues, believed in me, got justice served on my behalf. I highly recommend Mr Cohen.

Michael and his team helped me get the maximum for my case. Thank you Michael and Stephen for making me feel heard and for getting me what I deserve. I appreciate all the work you guys put in by going to bat against the malicious insurance company!

Michael C.Cohen is a very reliable Law office. He has very knowledgeable
Attorneys working in his office  Mr. Cohn assigned attorney David Levine to us to work with us on our case and David Levine help us win our case, Thank you David Levine and Mr. Cohen.

Mr. Cohen & his team to handle my
case. Very professional! I will recommend
Mr. Cohen Absolutely!
Mr. Cohen & his team were on the ball w my mil's case. He personally sat w us & appreciated my input. Ty, Mr. Cohen!
Great, Honest, Local Attorney. Very, very pleased with the outcome of my case.
